Leviticus11:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron saying:
Leviticus11:2 speak unto the children of Israel and say: these are the beasts which ye shall eat among all the beasts that are on the earth:
Leviticus11:3 whatsoever hath hoof and divideth it into two claws and cheweth cud among the beasts
Leviticus11:4 Nevertheless
Leviticus11:5 And the cony
Leviticus11:6 And the hare
Leviticus11:7 And the swine
Leviticus11:8 Of their flesh see that ye eat not
Leviticus11:9 These shall ye eat of all that are in the waters: whatsoever hath fins and scales in the waters
Leviticus11:10 And all that have not fins and scales in the seas and rivers of all that move and live in the waters
Leviticus11:11 See that ye eat not of their flesh
Leviticus11:12 for all that have no fins nor scales in the waters
Leviticus11:13 These are the fowls which ye shall abhor and which shall not be eaten
Leviticus11:14 the vulture and all his kind
Leviticus11:15 and all kind of ravens
Leviticus11:16 the ostrich
Leviticus11:17 the little owl
Leviticus11:18 the back
Leviticus11:19 the heron
Leviticus11:20 And all fowls that creep and go upon all fours shall be an abomination unto you.
Leviticus11:21 Yet these may ye eat of all the fowls that move and go upon four feet: even those that have no knees above upon their feet to leap withal upon the earth
Leviticus11:22 even these of them ye may eat: the arb and all his kind: the Soleam with all his kind: the Hargol and all the kind
Leviticus11:23 All other fowls that move and have four feet
Leviticus11:24 In such ye shall be unclean whosoever touch the carcass of the shall be unclean unto the even
Leviticus11:25 and whosoever beareth the carcass of them
Leviticus11:26 Among all manner beasts
Leviticus11:27 And all that goeth upon his hands among all manner beasts that go on all fours
Leviticus11:28 And he that beareth the carcass of them
Leviticus11:29 And these are also unclean to you among the things that creep upon the earth: the weasel
Leviticus11:30 the hedgehog
Leviticus11:31 These are unclean to you among all that move
Leviticus11:32 And whatsoever any of the dead carcasses of them fall upon
Leviticus11:33 All manner of earthen vessel whereinto any of them falleth
Leviticus11:34 All manner meat that is eaten
Leviticus11:35 And whether it be oven or kettle
Leviticus11:36 Neverthelater
Leviticus11:37 If the dead carcass of any such fall upon any seed used to sow
Leviticus11:38 but and if any water be poured upon the seed and afterward the dead carcass of them fall thereon
Leviticus11:39 If any beast of which ye eat die
Leviticus11:40 And he that eateth of any such dead carcass
Leviticus11:41 All that crawleth upon the earth
Leviticus11:42 And whatsoever goeth upon the breast
Leviticus11:43 Make not your souls abominable. Make not your souls abominable with nothing that creepeth
Leviticus11:44 For I am the LORD your God
Leviticus11:45 For I am the LORD that brought you out of the land of Egypt to be your God: be holy therefore
Leviticus11:46 This is the law of beast and fowl and of all manner thing that liveth and moveth in the water and of all things that creep upon the earth
Leviticus11:47 that ye may put difference between unclean and clean
Leviticus12:1 And the LORD spake Unto Moses and said:
Leviticus12:2 speak unto the children of Israel and say: when a woman hath conceived and hath borne a man child
Leviticus12:3 And in the eighth day the flesh of the child's foreskin shall be cut away.
Leviticus12:4 And she shall continue in the blood of her purifying thirty three days
Leviticus12:5 If she bear a maidchild
Leviticus12:6 And when the days of her purifying are out: whether it be a son or a daughter
Leviticus12:7 which shall offer them before the LORD
Leviticus12:8 But and if she be not able to bring a sheep
Leviticus13:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Aaron saying:
Leviticus13:2 when there appeareth a rising in any man's flesh either a scab or a glistering white: as though the plague of leprosy were in the skin of his flesh
Leviticus13:3 and let the priest look on the sore that is in the skin of his flesh. If the hair in the sore be turned unto white
Leviticus13:4 If there be but a white pleck in the skin of his flesh
Leviticus13:5 And let the priest look upon him the seventh day: if the sore seem to him to abide still and to go no further in the skin
Leviticus13:6 And let the priest look on him again the seventh day. Then if the sore be waxed blackish
Leviticus13:7 But and if the scab grow in the skin after that he is seen of the priest again.
Leviticus13:8 If the priest see that the scab be grown abroad in the skin
Leviticus13:9 If the plague of leprosy be in a man
Leviticus13:10 and let the priest see him. If the rising appear white in the skin
Leviticus13:11 then it is an old leprosy in the skin of his flesh. And the priest shall make him unclean
Leviticus13:12 If a leprosy break out in the skin and cover all the skin from the head to the foot over all wheresoever the priest looketh
Leviticus13:13 then let the priest look upon him. If the leprosy have covered all his flesh
Leviticus13:14 But and if there be raw flesh on him when he is seen
Leviticus13:15 Therefore when the priest seeth the raw flesh
Leviticus13:16 But and if the raw flesh depart again and change unto white
Leviticus13:17 and let the priest see him: If the sore be changed unto white
Leviticus13:18 When there is a beal in the skin of any man's flesh and is healed
Leviticus13:19 and after in the place of the beal there appear a white rising either a shining white somewhat reddish
Leviticus13:20 If when the priest seeth him it appear lower than the other skin and the hair thereof be changed unto white
Leviticus13:21 But and if when the priest looketh on it there be no white hairs therein neither the scab lower than the other skin and be somewhat blackish
Leviticus13:22 If it spread abroad in the mean season
Leviticus13:23 But and if the glistering white abide still in one place and go no further
Leviticus13:24 When the skin of any man's flesh is burnt with fire that it be raw and there appear in the burning a glistering white that is somewhat reddish or altogether white
Leviticus13:25 let the priest look upon it. If the hair in that brightness be changed to white and it also appear lower than the other skin
Leviticus13:26 But and if (when the priest looketh on it) he see that there is no white hair in the brightness
Leviticus13:27 And if (when the priest looketh on him the seventh day) it be grown abroad in the skin
Leviticus13:28 But and if that brightness abide still in one place and go no further in the skin and be blackish
Leviticus13:29 When either man or woman hath a breaking out upon the head or the beard
Leviticus13:30 And if it appear lower than the other skin
Leviticus13:31 If (when the priest looketh on the breaking out) he see that it is no lower than the other skin and that there are black hairs therein
Leviticus13:32 And let the priest look on the disease the seventh day: and if the breaking out be gone no further neither be any golden hairs therein neither the scab be lower than the other skin
Leviticus13:33 then let him be shaven
Leviticus13:34 And let the priest look on the breaking out the seventh day again: If the breaking out be gone no further in the skin nor more lower than the other skin
Leviticus13:35 If the breaking out grow in the skin after that he is once made(judged) clean
Leviticus13:36 let the priest see him. If it be grown abroad indeed in the skin
Leviticus13:37 But and if he see that the scab stand still
Leviticus13:38 If there be found in the skin of the flesh of man or woman a glistering white
Leviticus13:39 let the priest see it. If there appear in their flesh a glistering white somewhat blackish
Leviticus13:40 If a man's hair fall off his head
Leviticus13:41 If his hair fall before in his forehead
Leviticus13:42 If there be in the bald head or bald forehead a reddish white scab
Leviticus13:43 And let the priest see it: and if the rising of the sore be reddish white in his bald head or forehead after the manner of a leprosy in the skin of the flesh
Leviticus13:44 then he is a leper and unclean: and the priest shall make(judge) him unclean
Leviticus13:45 And the leper in whom the plague is
Leviticus13:46 And as long as the disease lasteth upon him
Leviticus13:47 When the plague of leprosy is in a cloth: whether it be linen or woollen
Leviticus13:48 yea and whether it be in the warp or woof of the linen or of the woollen: either in a skin or any thing made of skin
Leviticus13:49 if the disease be pale or somewhat reddish in the cloth or skin: whether it be in the warp or the woof or any thing that is made of skin
Leviticus13:50 And when the priest seeth the plague
Leviticus13:51 and let him look on the plague the seventh day. If it be increased in the cloth: whether it be in the warp or woof or in a skin or in anything that is made of skin
Leviticus13:52 And that cloth shall be burnt
Leviticus13:53 If the priest see that the plague hath fretten no further in the cloth: either in the warp or woof or in whatsoever thing of skin it be
Leviticus13:54 then let the priest command then to wash the thing wherein the plague is
Leviticus13:55 And let the priest look on it again after that the plague is washed. If the plague have not changed his fashion though it be spread no further abroad
Leviticus13:56 But and if the priest see that it is somewhat blackish after that it is washed
Leviticus13:57 But and if it appear any more in the cloth either in the warp or in the woof or in anything made of skin
Leviticus13:58 Moreover the cloth either warp or woof or whatsoever thing of skin it be which thou hast washed and the plague be departed from it
Leviticus13:59 This is the law of the plague of leprosy in a cloth whether it be woollen or linen: either whether it be in the warp or woof
Leviticus14:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus14:2 this is the law of a leper when he shall be cleansed: He shall be brought unto the priest
Leviticus14:3 and the priest shall go out without the host and look upon him. If the plague of leprosy be healed in the leper
Leviticus14:4 then shall the priest command that there be brought for him that shall be cleansed two living birds that are clean
Leviticus14:5 And the priest shall command that one of the birds be killed over(in) an earthen vessel of running water.
Leviticus14:6 And the priest shall take the living bird and the cypress(cedar) wood and the purple and the hyssop
Leviticus14:7 and sprinkle it upon him that must be cleansed of his leprosy seven times and cleanse him
Leviticus14:8 And he that is cleansed shall wash his clothes and shave off all his hair
Leviticus14:9 When the seventh day is come
Leviticus14:10 And when the eighth day is come
Leviticus14:11 Then let the priest that maketh him clean
Leviticus14:12 And let the priest take one of the lambs and offer him for a trespassoffering
Leviticus14:13 And then let him slay the lamb in the place where the sinoffering and the burntoffering are slain: even in the holy place. For as the sinoffering is
Leviticus14:14 Then let the priest take of the blood of the trespassoffering
Leviticus14:15 Then let the priest take of the log of oil
Leviticus14:16 and dip his right finger in the oil that is in the palm of his left hand
Leviticus14:17 And of the rest of the oil that is in his hand
Leviticus14:18 And the remnant of the oil that is in the priest's hand
Leviticus14:19 Then let the priest offer the sinoffering
Leviticus14:20 and let the priest put both the burntoffering and the meatoffering upon the altar; and make an atonement for him
Leviticus14:21 If he be poor and can not get so much
Leviticus14:22 and two turtle doves or two young pigeons which he is able to get
Leviticus14:23 And let him bring them the eighth day for his cleansing unto the priest to the door of the tabernacle of witness before the LORD.
Leviticus14:24 And let the priest take the lamb that is the trespassoffering and the log of oil
Leviticus14:25 And when the lamb of the trespassoffering is killed
Leviticus14:26 And the priest shall pour of the oil into his right hand
Leviticus14:27 and shall sprinkle with his finger of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the LORD.
Leviticus14:28 And the priest shall put of the oil that is in his hand
Leviticus14:29 And the rest of the oil that is in his hand
Leviticus14:30 And he shall offer one of the turtle doves or of the young pigeons
Leviticus14:31 the one for a sin offering and the other for a burntoffering upon the altar. And so shall the priest make an atonement for him that is cleansed before the LORD.
Leviticus14:32 This is the law of him that hath the plague of leprosy
Leviticus14:33 And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron saying:
Leviticus14:34 when ye be come unto the land of Canaan which I give you to possess: if I put the plague of leprosy in any house of the land of your possession
Leviticus14:35 let him that owneth the house go and tell the priest saying: me think that there is as it were a leprosy in the house.
Leviticus14:36 And the priest shall command them to rid all things out of the house
Leviticus14:37 If the priest see that the plague is in the walls of the house
Leviticus14:38 then let the priest go out at the house doors
Leviticus14:39 And let the priest come again the seventh day and see it: if the plague be increased in the walls of the house
Leviticus14:40 let the priest command them to take away the stones in which the plague is
Leviticus14:41 and scrape the house within round about
Leviticus14:42 And let them take other stones and put them in the places of those stones
Leviticus14:43 If now the plague come again and break out in the house
Leviticus14:44 let the priest come and see it. And if then he perceive that the plague hath eaten further in the house
Leviticus14:45 Then they shall break down the house: both stones
Leviticus14:46 Moreover he that goeth into the house all the while that it is shut up
Leviticus14:47 And he that sleepeth in the house shall wash his clothes
Leviticus14:48 But and if the priest come and see that the plague hath spread no further in the house after that it is new plastered
Leviticus14:49 And let him take to cleanse the house withal: two birds
Leviticus14:50 And let him kill one of the birds over(in) an earthen vessel of(with) running water:
Leviticus14:51 and take the cypress wood
Leviticus14:52 and cleanse the house with the blood of the bird
Leviticus14:53 And he shall let the living bird flee out of the town into the wild fields
Leviticus14:54 This is the law of all manner plague of leprosy and breaking out
Leviticus14:55 and of the leprosy of cloth and house:
Leviticus14:56 and of risings
Leviticus14:57 to teach when a thing is unclean or clean. This is the law of leprosy.
Leviticus15:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron
Leviticus15:2 saying: Speak unto the children of Israel and say unto them: every man that hath a running issue in his flesh
Leviticus15:3 And hereby shall it be known when he is unclean. If his flesh run
Leviticus15:4 Every couch whereon he lieth and every thing whereon he sitteth shall be unclean.
Leviticus15:5 He that twicheth his couch
Leviticus15:6 He that sitteth on that whereon he sat
Leviticus15:7 And he that twicheth his flesh shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean unto the evening.
Leviticus15:8 If any such spit upon him that is clean
Leviticus15:9 And whatsoever saddle that he rideth upon
Leviticus15:10 And whosoever twicheth anything that was under him
Leviticus15:11 and whosoever he twicheth (if he have not first washed his hands in water) must wash his clothes
Leviticus15:12 And if he twich a vessel of earth
Leviticus15:13 When he that hath an issue is cleansed of his issue
Leviticus15:14 And the eighth day let him take two turtle doves or two young pigeons
Leviticus15:15 And the priest shall offer them: the one for a sinoffering
Leviticus15:16 If any man's seed depart from him in his sleep
Leviticus15:17 And all the clothes or furs whereon such seed chanceth shall be washed with water and be unclean unto the evening.
Leviticus15:18 And if a woman lie with such a one
Leviticus15:19 When a woman's natural course of blood runneth
Leviticus15:20 And all that she lieth (or sitteth) upon as long as she is put apart shall be unclean.
Leviticus15:21 And whosoever twicheth her couch shall wash his clothes and bathe himself with water and be unclean unto the evening.
Leviticus15:22 And whosoever twicheth anything that she sat upon
Leviticus15:23 so that whether he twich her couch or anything whereon she hath sitten
Leviticus15:24 And if a man lie with her in the mean time
Leviticus15:25 When a woman's blood runneth long time: whether out of the time of her natural course: as long as her uncleanness runneth
Leviticus15:26 All her couches whereon she lieth (as long as her issue lasteth) shall be unto her as her couch when she is put apart. And whatsoever she sitteth upon
Leviticus15:27 And whosoever twicheth them
Leviticus15:28 And when(But if) she is cleansed(be clean) of her issue
Leviticus15:29 And the eighth day let her take two turtles or two young pigeons and bring them unto the priest unto the door of the tabernacle of witness.
Leviticus15:30 And the priest shall offer the one for a sinoffering
Leviticus15:31 Make the children of Israel to keep them selves from their uncleanness
Leviticus15:32 This is the law of him that hath a running sore
Leviticus15:33 and of her that hath an issue of blood as long as she is put apart
Leviticus16:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses after the death of the two sons of Aaron
Leviticus16:2 And he said unto Moses: speak unto Aaron thy brother that he go not at all times into the holy place
Leviticus16:3 But of this manner shall Aaron go in into the holy place: with a young ox(bullock) for a sinoffering
Leviticus16:4 And he shall put the holy linen alb upon him
Leviticus16:5 And he shall take of the multitude of the children of Israel two goats for a sinoffering and a ram for a burntoffering.
Leviticus16:6 And Aaron shall offer the ox for his sinoffering and make an atonement for him and for his house.
Leviticus16:7 And he shall take the two goats and present them before the LORD in the door of the tabernacle of witness.
Leviticus16:8 And Aaron cast lots over the two goats: one lot for the LORD
Leviticus16:9 And Aaron shall bring the goat upon which the LORD's lot fell
Leviticus16:10 But the goat on which the lot fell to scape
Leviticus16:11 And Aaron shall bring the ox of his sinoffering
Leviticus16:12 And then he shall take a censer full of burning coals out of the altar that is before the LORD
Leviticus16:13 and put the cense upon the fire before the LORD: that the cloud of the cense may cover the mercy seat that is upon the witness
Leviticus16:14 And he shall take of the blood of the ox and sprinkle it with his finger before the mercy seat eastward: even seven times.
Leviticus16:15 Then shall he kill the goat that is the people's sinoffering
Leviticus16:16 and reconcile the holy place from the uncleanness of the children of Israel
Leviticus16:17 And there shall be nobody in the tabernacle of witness
Leviticus16:18 Then he shall go out unto the altar that standeth before the LORD
Leviticus16:19 and sprinkle of the blood upon it with his finger seven times
Leviticus16:20 And when he hath made an end of reconciling the holy place and the tabernacle of witness and the altar
Leviticus16:21 and let Aaron put both his hands upon the head of the live goat
Leviticus16:22 And the goat shall bear upon him all their misdeeds unto the wilderness
Leviticus16:23 And let Aaron go in to the tabernacle of witness and put off the line clothes which he put on when he went in into the holy place
Leviticus16:24 And let him wash his flesh with water in the holy place
Leviticus16:25 and the fat of the sinoffering let him burn upon the altar.
Leviticus16:26 And let him that carried forth the scapegoat
Leviticus16:27 And the ox of the sinoffering and the goat of the sinoffering (whose blood was brought in to make an atonement in the holy place) let one carry out without the host and burn with fire: both their skins
Leviticus16:28 And let him that burneth them
Leviticus16:29 And it(this) shall be an ordinance for ever unto you. And even in the tenth day of the seventh month
Leviticus16:30 for that day shall an atonement be made for you to cleanse you from all your sins before the LORD
Leviticus16:31 It shall be a Sabbath of rest unto you
Leviticus16:32 And the priest that is anointed and whose hand was filled to minister in his father's stead
Leviticus16:33 and reconcile the holy sanctuary and the tabernacle of witness and the altar
Leviticus16:34 And this shall be an everlasting ordinance unto you to make an atonement for the children of Israel for all their sins once a year: and it was done even as the LORD commanded Moses.
Leviticus17:1 And the LORD talked with Moses saying:
Leviticus17:2 speak unto Aaron and unto his sons and unto all the children of Israel and say unto them
Leviticus17:3 whatsoever he be of the house of Israel that killeth an ox
Leviticus17:4 and bringeth them not unto the door of the tabernacle of witness
Leviticus17:5 Wherefore let the children of Israel bring their offerings they offer in the wide field
Leviticus17:6 And the priest shall sprinkle the blood upon the altar of the LORD in the door of the tabernacle of witness
Leviticus17:7 And let them no more offer their offerings unto devils
Leviticus17:8 And thou shalt say unto them: whatsoever man it be of the house of Israel or of the strangers that sojourn among you that offereth a burntoffering or any other offering
Leviticus17:9 and bringeth it not unto the door of the tabernacle of witness to offer unto the LORD
Leviticus17:10 And whatsoever man it be of the house of Israel or of the strangers that sojourn among you that eateth any manner of blood
Leviticus17:11 for the life of the flesh is in the blood
Leviticus17:12 And therefore I said unto the children of Israel: see that no soul of you eat blood
Leviticus17:13 Whatsoever man it be of the children of Israel or of the strangers that sojourn among you that hunteth and catcheth any beast or fowl that may be eaten
Leviticus17:14 For the life of all flesh is in the blood
Leviticus17:15 And whatsoever soul it be that eateth that which died alone or that which was torn with wild beasts: whether it be one of your selves or a stranger
Leviticus17:16 But and if he wash them not nor wash his flesh he shall bear his sin.
Leviticus18:1 And the LORD talked with Moses saying:
Leviticus18:2 speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus18:3 Wherefore after the doings of the land of Egypt wherein ye dwelt
Leviticus18:4 but do after my judgments
Leviticus18:5 Keep therefore mine ordinances
Leviticus18:6 See that ye go to none of your nighest kindred for to uncover their secrets
Leviticus18:7 The secrets of thy father and thy mother
Leviticus18:8 The secrets of thy father's wife shalt thou not discover
Leviticus18:9 Thou shalt not discover the privity of thy sister
Leviticus18:10 Thou shalt not discover the secrets of thy son's daughter or thy daughter's daughter
Leviticus18:11 Thou shalt not discover the secrets of thy father's wife's daughter
Leviticus18:12 Thou shalt not uncover the secrets of thy father's sister
Leviticus18:13 Thou shalt not discover the secrets of thy mother's sister
Leviticus18:14 Thou shalt not open(uncover) the secrets of thy father's brother: that is thou shalt not go in to his wife
Leviticus18:15 Thou shalt not discover the secrets of thy daughter-in-law she is thy son's wife: therefore uncover not her secrets.
Leviticus18:16 Thou shalt not unhele the secrets of thy brother's wife
Leviticus18:17 Thou shalt not discover the privates(privities) of the wife and her daughter also
Leviticus18:18 Thou shalt not take a wife and her sister thereto
Leviticus18:19 Thou shalt not go unto a woman to open her secrets
Leviticus18:20 Thou shalt not lie with thy neighbour's wife
Leviticus18:21 Thou shalt not give of thy seed to offer it unto Moloch
Leviticus18:22 Thou shalt not lie with mankind as with womankind
Leviticus18:23 Thou shalt lie with no manner of beast to defile thyself therewith
Leviticus18:24 Defile not your selves in any of these things
Leviticus18:25 and the land is defiled
Leviticus18:26 Keep ye therefore mine ordinances and judgements
Leviticus18:27 (for all these abominations have the men of the land done which were there before you
Leviticus18:28 lest that the land spew you out when ye have defiled it
Leviticus18:29 For whosoever shall commit any of these abominations
Leviticus18:30 Therefore see that ye keep mine ordinances
Leviticus19:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus19:2 speak unto all the multitude of the children of Israel
Leviticus19:3 See that ye fear every man his father and his mother
Leviticus19:4 Ye shall not turn unto idols nor make you gods of metal: I am the LORD your God.
Leviticus19:5 When ye offer your peaceofferings unto the LORD
Leviticus19:6 And it shall be eaten the same day ye offer it and on the morrow
Leviticus19:7 If it be eaten the third day
Leviticus19:8 And he that eateth it shall bear his sin
Leviticus19:9 When ye reap down the ripe corn of your land
Leviticus19:10 Thou shalt not pluck in all thy vineyard clean
Leviticus19:11 Ye shall not steal neither lie
Leviticus19:12 Ye shall not swear by my name falsely: that thou defilest not the name of thy God
Leviticus19:13 Thou shalt not beguile thy neighbour with cavillations
Leviticus19:14 Thou shalt not curse the deaf
Leviticus19:15 Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgement. Thou shalt not favour the poor nor honour the mighty
Leviticus19:16 Thou shalt not go up and down a privy accuser among thy people
Leviticus19:17 Thou shalt not hate thy brother in thine heart but shalt in any wise rebuke thy neighbour: that thou bear not sin for his sake.
Leviticus19:18 Thou shalt not avenge thyself nor bear hate in thy mind against the children of thy people
Leviticus19:19 Keep mine ordinances. Let none of thy cattle gender with a contrary kind
Leviticus19:20 If a man have to do with a woman that is bond and hath been meddled with all of another man which neither is bought nor freedom given her
Leviticus19:21 And he shall bring for his trespassoffering unto the LORD: even unto the door of the tabernacle of witness
Leviticus19:22 And the priest shall make an atonement for him with the ram of the trespassoffering before the LORD
Leviticus19:23 And when ye come to the land and have planted all manner of trees whereof men eat
Leviticus19:24 and the fourth year all the fruit of them shall be holy and acceptable to the LORD.
Leviticus19:25 And the fifth year may ye eat of the fruit of them
Leviticus19:26 Ye shall eat nothing with the blood
Leviticus19:27 ye shall not round the locks of your heads
Leviticus19:28 Ye shall not rent your flesh for any soul's sake
Leviticus19:29 Thou shalt not pollute thy daughter
Leviticus19:30 See that ye keep my Sabbaths and fear my sanctuary: I am the LORD.
Leviticus19:31 Turn not to them that work with spirits
Leviticus19:32 Thou shalt rise up before the hoarhead
Leviticus19:33 If a stranger sojourn by thee in your land
Leviticus19:34 But let the stranger that dwelleth with you
Leviticus19:35 Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgement neither in meteyard
Leviticus19:36 But ye shall have true balances
Leviticus19:37 that ye should observe all mine ordinances and judgments and that ye should keep them: I am the LORD.
Leviticus20:1 And the LORD talked with Moses saying:
Leviticus20:2 tell the children of Israel
Leviticus20:3 And I will set my face upon that fellow
Leviticus20:4 And though that the people of the land hide their eyes from that fellow
Leviticus20:5 yet I will put my face upon that man and upon his household
Leviticus20:6 If any soul turn unto them that work with spirits or makers of dismal days(turn him to enchanters or expounders of tokens) and go a whoring after them
Leviticus20:7 Sanctify your selves therefore and be holy
Leviticus20:8 And see that ye keep mine ordinances and do them. For I am the LORD which sanctify you.
Leviticus20:9 Whosoever curseth his father or mother
Leviticus20:10 He that breaketh wedlock with another man's wife shall die for it
Leviticus20:11 If a man lie with his father's wife and uncover his father's secrets
Leviticus20:12 If a man lie with his daughter-in-law they shall die both of them: they have wrought abomination
Leviticus20:13 If a man lie with the mankind after the manner as with womankind
Leviticus20:14 If a man take a wife and her mother thereto
Leviticus20:15 If a man lie with a beast he shall die
Leviticus20:16 If a woman go unto a beast and lie down thereto: thou shalt kill the woman and the beast also they shall die
Leviticus20:17 If a man take his sister
Leviticus20:18 If a man lie with a woman in time of her natural disease and unheal(uncover) her secrets and uncover(open) her fountain
Leviticus20:19 Thou shalt not uncover the secrets of thy mother's sister nor of thy father's sisters
Leviticus20:20 If a man lie with his uncle's wife
Leviticus20:21 If a man take his brother's wife
Leviticus20:22 See that ye keep therefore all mine ordinances and all my judgements
Leviticus20:23 And see that ye walk not in the manners of the nations which I cast out before you: For they committed all these things
Leviticus20:24 But I have said unto you that ye shall enjoy their land
Leviticus20:25 that ye should put difference between clean beasts and unclean
Leviticus20:26 Be holy unto me
Leviticus20:27 If there be man or woman that worketh with a spirit or a maker of dismal days
Leviticus21:1 And the LORD said unto Moses: speak unto the priests the sons of Aaron and say unto them: A priest shall defile himself at the death of none of his people
Leviticus21:2 but upon his kin that is nigh unto him: as his mother
Leviticus21:3 and on his sister as long as she is a maid and dwelleth nigh him and was never given to man: on her he may defile himself.
Leviticus21:4 But he shall not make himself unclean upon a ruler of his people to pollute himself withal.
Leviticus21:5 They shall make them no baldness upon their heads or shave off the locks of their beards
Leviticus21:6 They shall be holy unto their God
Leviticus21:7 They shall take no wife that is an whore
Leviticus21:8 Sanctify him therefore
Leviticus21:9 If a priest's daughter fall to play the whore
Leviticus21:10 He that is the high priest among his brethren upon whose head the anointing oil was poured and whose hand was filled to put on the vestments
Leviticus21:11 neither shall go to any dead body nor make himself unclean: no not on his father or mother
Leviticus21:12 neither shall go out of the sanctuary
Leviticus21:13 He shall take a maiden unto his wife:
Leviticus21:14 but no widow nor divorced nor polluted whore. But he shall take a maiden of his own people to wife
Leviticus21:15 that he defile not his seed upon his people. For I am the LORD which sanctify him.
Leviticus21:16 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying
Leviticus21:17 speak unto Aaron and say: No man of thy seed in their generations that hath any deformity upon him
Leviticus21:18 For none that hath any blemish shall come near: whether he be blind
Leviticus21:19 or broken footed
Leviticus21:20 or crook backed
Leviticus21:21 No man that is deformed of the seed of Aaron the priest
Leviticus21:22 Notwithstanding he shall eat of the bread of his God: even as well of the most holy
Leviticus21:23 but shall not go in unto the vail nor come nigh the altar
Leviticus21:24 And Moses told it unto Aaron and to his sons
Leviticus22:1 And the LORD communed with Moses saying:
Leviticus22:2 bid Aaron and his sons that they abstain from the hallowed things of the children of Israel which they have hallowed unto me
Leviticus22:3 Say unto them: whosoever he be of all your seed among your generation after you
Leviticus22:4 None of the seed of Aaron that is a leper or that hath a running sore
Leviticus22:5 or whosoever twicheth any worm that is unclean to him
Leviticus22:6 the same soul that hath twiched any such thing
Leviticus22:7 And then when the son is down he shall be clean and shall afterward eat of the hallowed things: for they are his food.
Leviticus22:8 Of a beast that dieth alone or is rent with wild beasts
Leviticus22:9 But let them keep therefore mine ordinance
Leviticus22:10 There shall no stranger eat of the hallowed things
Leviticus22:11 But if the priest buy any fowl with money he may eat of it
Leviticus22:12 If the priest's daughter be married unto a stranger
Leviticus22:13 Notwithstanding if the priest's daughter be a widow or divorced and have no child but is returned unto her father's house again
Leviticus22:14 If a man eat of the hallowed things unwittingly
Leviticus22:15 And let the priests see
Leviticus22:16 lest they lade them selves with misdoing and trespass in eating their hallowed things
Leviticus22:17 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus22:18 speak unto Aaron and his sons and unto all the children of Israel and say unto them
Leviticus22:19 it must be a male without blemish of the oxen
Leviticus22:20 let them offer nothing that is deformed for they shall get no favour therewith.
Leviticus22:21 If a man will offer a peaceoffering unto the LORD and separate a vow or a freewill offering of the oxen or the flock
Leviticus22:22 whether it be blind
Leviticus22:23 An ox or a sheep that hath any member out of proportion
Leviticus22:24 Thou shalt not offer unto the LORD that which hath his stones bruised
Leviticus22:25 neither of a stranger's hand shall ye offer an offering to your God of any such. For they mar all in that they have deformities in them
Leviticus22:26 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus22:27 when an ox
Leviticus22:28 And whether it be ox or sheep
Leviticus22:29 When ye will offer a thankoffering unto the LORD
Leviticus22:30 And the same day it must be eaten up
Leviticus22:31 keep now my commandments and do them
Leviticus22:32 And pollute not my holy name
Leviticus22:33 and brought you out of the land of Egypt
Leviticus23:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus23:2 speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus23:3 Six days ye shall work
Leviticus23:4 These are the feasts of the LORD which ye shall proclaim holy in their seasons.
Leviticus23:5 The fourteenth day of the first month at evening is the LORD's Passover.
Leviticus23:6 And the fifteenth day of the same month is the feast of sweet bread unto the LORD
Leviticus23:7 The first day shall be an holy feast unto you
Leviticus23:8 But ye shall offer sacrifices unto the LORD seven days
Leviticus23:9 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus23:10 speak unto the children of Israel and say unto them: when ye be come into the land which I give unto you and reap down your harvest
Leviticus23:11 and he shall wave the sheaf before the LORD to be accepted for you: and even the morrow after the Sabbath the priest shall wave it.
Leviticus23:12 And ye shall offer the day when he waveth the sheaf
Leviticus23:13 and the meatoffering thereof
Leviticus23:14 And ye shall eat neither bread
Leviticus23:15 And ye shall count from the morrow after the Sabbath: even from the day that ye brought the sheaf of the waveoffering
Leviticus23:16 even unto the morrow after the seventh week ye shall number fifty days. And then ye shall bring a new meatoffering unto the LORD.
Leviticus23:17 And ye shall bring out of your habitations two wave loaves made of two tenth deals of fine flour leavened and baken
Leviticus23:18 And ye shall bring with the bread seven lambs without deformity of one year of age
Leviticus23:19 And ye shall offer an he goat for a sinoffering: and two lambs of one year old for peaceofferings.
Leviticus23:20 And the priest shall wave them with the bread of the first fruits before the LORD
Leviticus23:21 And ye shall make a proclamation the same day that it be an holy feast unto you
Leviticus23:22 When ye reap down your harvest
Leviticus23:23 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus23:24 speak unto the children of Israel and say: The first day of the seventh month shall be a rest of remembrance unto you
Leviticus23:25 and ye shall do no laborious work therein
Leviticus23:26 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus23:27 also the tenth day of the self seventh month
Leviticus23:28 Moreover ye shall do no work the same day
Leviticus23:29 For whatsoever soul it be that humbleth not himself that day
Leviticus23:30 And whatsoever soul do any manner work that day
Leviticus23:31 See that ye do no manner work therefore. And it shall be a law for ever unto your generations after you in all your dwellings.
Leviticus23:32 A Sabbath of rest it shall be unto you
Leviticus23:33 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus23:34 speak unto the children of Israel and say: the fifteenth day of the same seventh month shall be the feast of tabernacles seven days unto the LORD.
Leviticus23:35 The first day shall be an holy feast
Leviticus23:36 Seven days ye shall offer sacrifice unto the LORD
Leviticus23:37 These are the feasts of the LORD which ye shall proclaim holy feasts
Leviticus23:38 beside the Sabbaths of the LORD
Leviticus23:39 Moreover in the fifteenth day of the seventh month after that ye have gathered in the fruits of the land
Leviticus23:40 And ye shall take you the first day
Leviticus23:41 And ye shall keep it holy day unto the LORD seven days in the year. And it shall be a law for ever unto your children after you
Leviticus23:42 And ye shall dwell in booths seven days: even all that are Israelites born
Leviticus23:43 that your children after you may know how that I made the children of Israel dwell in booths
Leviticus23:44 And Moses told all the feasts of the LORD unto the children of Israel.
Leviticus24:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus24:2 command the children of Israel that they bring unto thee
Leviticus24:3 without the vail of testimony(witness) within the tabernacle of witness. And Aaron shall dress them both evening and morning before the LORD always. And if shall be a law for ever among your children after you.
Leviticus24:4 And he shall dress the lamps upon the pure candlestick before the LORD perpetually.
Leviticus24:5 And thou shalt take fine flour and bake twelve wastels thereof
Leviticus24:6 And make two rows of them
Leviticus24:7 and put pure frankincense upon the rows. And it shall be bread of remembrance
Leviticus24:8 Every Sabbath he shall put them in rows before the LORD evermore
Leviticus24:9 And they shall be Aaron's and his sons
Leviticus24:10 And the son of an Israelitish wife whose father was an Egyptian
Leviticus24:11 And the Israelitish woman's son blasphemed the name and cursed
Leviticus24:12 and they put him in ward
Leviticus24:13 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying
Leviticus24:14 bring him that cursed(blasphemed) without the host
Leviticus24:15 And speak unto the children of Israel saying: Whosoever curseth his God
Leviticus24:16 And he that blasphemeth the name of the LORD
Leviticus24:17 He that killeth any man
Leviticus24:18 but he that killeth a beast shall pay for it
Leviticus24:19 If a man maim his neighbour
Leviticus24:20 broke for broke
Leviticus24:21 So now he that killeth a beast
Leviticus24:22 Ye shall have one manner of law among you: even for the stranger as well as for one of your selves
Leviticus24:23 And Moses told the children of Israel
Leviticus25:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses in mount Sinai saying
Leviticus25:2 speak unto the children of Israel and say unto them: When ye be come in to the land which I give you
Leviticus25:3 Six years thou shalt sow thy field
Leviticus25:4 But the seventh year shall be a Sabbath of rest unto the land. The LORD's Sabbath it shall be
Leviticus25:5 The corn that groweth by itself thou shalt not reap
Leviticus25:6 Nevertheless the Sabbath of the land shall be meat for you: even for thee and thy servant and for thy maid and for thy hired servant and for the stranger that dwelleth with thee:
Leviticus25:7 and for thy cattle and for the beasts that are in thy land
Leviticus25:8 Then number seven weeks of years
Leviticus25:9 And then thou shalt make an horn blow: even in the tenth day of the seventh month
Leviticus25:10 And ye shall hallow the fiftieth year
Leviticus25:11 A year of horns blowing shall that fiftieth year be unto you. Ye shall not sow neither reap the corn that groweth by itself
Leviticus25:12 For it is a year of horns blowing and shall be holy unto you: how be it
Leviticus25:13 And in this year of horns blowing ye shall return
Leviticus25:14 When thou sellest ought unto thy neighbour or buyest of thy neighbour's hand
Leviticus25:15 but according to the number of years after the trompet year
Leviticus25:16 According unto the multitude of years
Leviticus25:17 And see that no man oppress his neighbour
Leviticus25:18 Wherefore do after mine ordinances and keep my laws and do them
Leviticus25:19 And the land shall give her fruit
Leviticus25:20 If ye shall say
Leviticus25:21 I will send my blessing upon you in the sixth year
Leviticus25:22 and ye shall sow the eighth year and eat of old fruit until the ninth year
Leviticus25:23 Wherefore the land shall not be sold for ever
Leviticus25:24 and ye shall thorowout all the land of your possession
Leviticus25:25 When thy brother is waxed poor and hath sold away of his possession: if any of his kin come to redeem it
Leviticus25:26 And though he have no man to redeem it for him
Leviticus25:27 then let him count how long it hath been sold
Leviticus25:28 But and if his hand can not get sufficient to restore it to him again
Leviticus25:29 If a man sell a dwelling house in a walled city
Leviticus25:30 But and if it be not bought out again within the space of a full year
Leviticus25:31 But the houses in villages which have no walls round about them
Leviticus25:32 Notwithstanding the cities of the Levites and the houses in the cities of their possessions the Levites may redeem at all seasons.
Leviticus25:33 And if a man purchase ought of the Levites: whether it be house or city that they possess
Leviticus25:34 But the fields that lie round about their cities
Leviticus25:35 If thy brother be waxed poor and fallen in decay with thee
Leviticus25:36 And thou shalt take none usury of him
Leviticus25:37 Thou shalt not lend him thy money upon usury
Leviticus25:38 for I am the LORD your God which brought you out of the land of Egypt
Leviticus25:39 If thy brother that dwelleth by thee wax poor and sell himself unto thee
Leviticus25:40 but as an hired servant and as a sojourner he shall be with thee
Leviticus25:41 and then shall he depart from thee: both he and his children with him
Leviticus25:42 for they are my servants which I brought out of the land of Egypt
Leviticus25:43 See therefore that thou reign not over him cruelly
Leviticus25:44 If thou wilt have bondservants and maidens
Leviticus25:45 and of the children of the strangers that are sojourners among you
Leviticus25:46 And ye shall possess them and give them unto your children after you
Leviticus25:47 When a stranger and a sojourner waxeth rich by thee
Leviticus25:48 after that he is sold he may be redeemed again: one of his brethren may buy him out:
Leviticus25:49 whether it be his uncle or his uncle's son
Leviticus25:50 And he shall reckon with him that bought him
Leviticus25:51 If there be yet many years behind
Leviticus25:52 If there remain but few years unto the trompet year
Leviticus25:53 and shall be with him year by year as an hired servant
Leviticus25:54 If he be not bought free in the meantime
Leviticus25:55 for the children of Israel are my servants which I brought out of the land of Egypt. I am the LORD your God.
Leviticus26:1 Ye shall make you no idols
Leviticus26:2 keep my Sabbaths and fear my sanctuary. For I am the LORD.
Leviticus26:3 If ye shall walk in mine ordinances and keep my commandments and do them
Leviticus26:4 then I will send you rain in the right season and your land shall yield her increase and the trees of the field shall give their fruit.
Leviticus26:5 And the threshing shall reach unto wine harvest
Leviticus26:6 And I will send peace in your land
Leviticus26:7 And ye shall chase your enemies
Leviticus26:8 And five of you shall chase an hundred
Leviticus26:9 And I will turn unto you and increase you and multiply you
Leviticus26:10 And ye shall eat old store
Leviticus26:11 I will make my dwelling place among you
Leviticus26:12 And I will walk among you and will be your God
Leviticus26:13 For I am the LORD your God
Leviticus26:14 But and if ye will not hearken unto me
Leviticus26:15 or if ye shall despise mine ordinances either if your souls refuse my laws
Leviticus26:16 then I will do this again unto you: I will visit you with vexations
Leviticus26:17 And I will set my face against you and ye shall fall before your enemies
Leviticus26:18 And if ye will not yet for all this hearken unto me
Leviticus26:19 and will break the pride of your strength. For I will make the heaven over you as hard as iron
Leviticus26:20 And so your labour shall be spent in vain. For your land shall not give her increase
Leviticus26:21 And if ye walk contrary unto me and will not hearken unto me
Leviticus26:22 I will send in wild beasts upon you
Leviticus26:23 And if ye will not be learned yet for all this but shall walk contrary unto me
Leviticus26:24 then will I also walk contrary unto you and will punish you yet seven times for your sins.
Leviticus26:25 I will send a sword upon you
Leviticus26:26 And when I have broken the staff of your bread: that ten wives shall bake your bread in one oven and men shall deliver you your bread again by weight
Leviticus26:27 And if ye will not yet for all this hearken unto me
Leviticus26:28 then I will walk contrary unto you also wrathfully
Leviticus26:29 so that ye shall eat the flesh of your sons and the flesh of your daughters.
Leviticus26:30 And I will destroy your altars built upon high hills
Leviticus26:31 And I will make your cities desolate
Leviticus26:32 And I will bring the land unto a wilderness: so that your enemies which dwell therein shall wonder at it.
Leviticus26:33 And I will straw you among the heathen
Leviticus26:34 Then the land shall rejoice in her Sabbaths
Leviticus26:35 And as long as it lieth void it shall rest
Leviticus26:36 And upon them that are left alive of you
Leviticus26:37 And they shall fall one upon another
Leviticus26:38 And ye shall perish among the heathen
Leviticus26:39 And they that are left of you
Leviticus26:40 And they shall confess their misdeeds and the misdeeds of their fathers in their trespasses which they have trespassed against me
Leviticus26:41 Therefore I also will walk contrary unto them
Leviticus26:42 And I will remember my bond with Jacob and my testament with Isaac
Leviticus26:43 For the land shall be left of them and shall have pleasure in her Sabbaths
Leviticus26:44 And yet for all that when they be in the land of their enemies
Leviticus26:45 I will therefore remember unto them the first covenant made when I brought them out of the land of Egypt in the sight of the heathen to be their God: for I am the LORD.
Leviticus26:46 These are the ordinances
Leviticus27:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Leviticus27:2 speak unto the children of Israel and say unto them: If any man will give a singular vow unto the LORD according to the value of his soul
Leviticus27:3 then shall the male from twenty year unto forty be set at fifty sicles of silver
Leviticus27:4 and the female at thirty sicles.
Leviticus27:5 And from five years to twenty the male shall be set at twenty sicles
Leviticus27:6 And from a month unto five year
Leviticus27:7 And the man that is forty and above
Leviticus27:8 If he be too poor so to be set
Leviticus27:9 If it be of the beasts of which men bring an offering unto the LORD: all that any man giveth of such unto the LORD
Leviticus27:10 He may not alter it nor change it: a good for a bad or a bad for good. If he change beast for beast
Leviticus27:11 If it be any manner of unclean beast of which men may not offer unto the LORD
Leviticus27:12 and let the priest value it. And whether it be good or bad as the priest setteth it
Leviticus27:13 And if he will buy it again
Leviticus27:14 If any man dedicate his house
Leviticus27:15 If he that sanctified it will redeem his house
Leviticus27:16 If a man hallow a piece of his inherited land unto the LORD
Leviticus27:17 If he hallow his field immediately from the trompet year
Leviticus27:18 But and if he hallow his field after the trumpet year
Leviticus27:19 If he that sanctified the field will redeem it again
Leviticus27:20 thereunto
Leviticus27:21 But when the field goeth out in the trompet year
Leviticus27:22 If a man sanctify unto the LORD a field
Leviticus27:23 then the priest shall reckon with him what it is worth unto the trompet year
Leviticus27:24 But in the trompet year
Leviticus27:25 And all setting shall be according to the holy sicle. One sicle maketh twenty geras.
Leviticus27:26 But the firstborn of the beasts that pertain unto the LORD
Leviticus27:27 If it be an unclean beast
Leviticus27:28 Notwithstanding no dedicated thing that a man dedicateth unto the LORD
Leviticus27:29 No dedicated thing therefore that is dedicate of man
Leviticus27:30 All these tithes of the land
Leviticus27:31 If any man will redeem ought of his tithes
Leviticus27:32 And the tithes of oxen and sheep and of all that goeth under the herdman's keeping
Leviticus27:33 Men shall not look if it be good or bad nor shall change it. If any man change it then both it and that it was changed withall
Leviticus27:34 These are the commandments which the LORD gave Moses in charge to give unto the children of Israel in mount Sinai. [The end of the third book of Moses.]
Numbers1:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai
Numbers1:2 take ye the sum of all the multitude of the children of Israel
Numbers1:3 from twenty year and above: even all that are able to go forth in to war in Israel
Numbers1:4 and with you shall be of every tribe a head man in the house of his father.
Numbers1:5 And these are the names of the men that shall stand with you: in Ruben
Numbers1:6 In Simeon
Numbers1:7 In the tribe of Juda
Numbers1:8 In Isachar
Numbers1:9 In Zabulon
Numbers1:10 Among the children of Joseph: In Ephraim
Numbers1:11 In BenJamin
Numbers1:12 In Dan
Numbers1:13 In Aser
Numbers1:14 In Gad
Numbers1:15 In Naphtali
Numbers1:16 These were councillors of the congregation and lords in the tribes of their fathers and captains over thousands in Israel.
Numbers1:17 And Moses and Aaron took these men above named
Numbers1:18 and gathered all the congregation together
Numbers1:19 as the LORD commanded Moses
Numbers1:20 And the children of Ruben Israel's eldest son in their generations
Numbers1:21 were numbered in the tribe of Ruben
Numbers1:22 Among the children of Simeon: their generation in their kindreds and houses of their fathers (when every man's name was told) of all the males from twenty years and above
Numbers1:23 were numbered in the tribe of Simeon forty nine thousand and three hundred.
Numbers1:24 Among the children of Gad: their generation in their kindreds and households of their fathers
Numbers1:25 were numbered in the tribe of Gad forty five thousand
Numbers1:26 Among the children of Juda: their generation in their kindreds and houses of their fathers (by the number of names) from twenty year and above
Numbers1:27 were told in the tribe of Juda seventy four thousand and six hundred.
Numbers1:28 Among the children of Isachar: their generation
Numbers1:29 were numbered in the tribe of Isachar fifty four thousand and four hundred.
Numbers1:30 Among the children of Zabulon: their generation
Numbers1:31 were counted in the tribe of Zabulon fifty seven thousand and four hundred.
Numbers1:32 Among the children of Joseph: first among the children of Ephraim: their generation
Numbers1:33 were in number in the tribe of Ephraim
Numbers1:34 Among the children of Manasse: their generation
Numbers1:35 from twenty and above were numbered in the tribe of Manasse thirty two thousand and two hundred.
Numbers1:36 Among the children of BenJamin: their generation
Numbers1:37 were numbered in the tribe of BenJamin thirty five thousand and four hundred.
Numbers1:38 Among the children of Dan: their generation in their kindreds and houses of their fathers (in the sum of names) of all that was apt to war
Numbers1:39 from twenty year and above
Numbers1:40 Among the children of Asser: their generation
Numbers1:41 were numbered in the tribe of Asser forty one thousand and five hundred.
Numbers1:42 Among the children of Naphtali: their generation in their kindreds and houses of their fathers (when their names were told) from twenty years and above
Numbers1:43 were numbered in the tribe of Naphtali fifty three thousand and four hundred.
Numbers1:44 These are the numbers which Moses and Aaron numbered with the twelve princes of Israel: of every house of their fathers a man.
Numbers1:45 And all the numbers of the children of Israel
Numbers1:46 drew unto the sum of six hundred and three thousand
Numbers1:47 But the Levites in the tribe of their fathers were not numbered among them.
Numbers1:48 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers1:49 only see that thou number not the tribe of Levi
Numbers1:50 But thou shalt appoint the Levites unto the habitation of witness
Numbers1:51 And when the tabernacle goeth forth the Levites shall take it down: and when the tabernacle is pitched
Numbers1:52 And the children of Israel shall pitch their tents
Numbers1:53 But the Levites shall pitch round about the habitation of witness
Numbers1:54 And the children of Israel did according to all that the LORD commanded Moses.
Numbers2:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron saying:
Numbers2:2 The children of Israel shall pitch: every man by his own standard with the arms of their father's houses
Numbers2:3 On the eastside toward the rising of the son
Numbers2:4 And his host and the number of them seventy four thousand and six hundred.
Numbers2:5 And next unto him shall the tribe of Isachar pitch and Nathaneel the son of Zuar captain over the children of Isachar:
Numbers2:6 his host and the number of them fifty four thousand and four hundred.
Numbers2:7 And then the tribe of Zabulon: with Eliab the son of Helon
Numbers2:8 and his host in the number of them: fifty seven thousand and four hundred.
Numbers2:9 So that all they that pertain unto the host of Juda
Numbers2:10 And on the south side
Numbers2:11 and his host and the number of them forty six thousand
Numbers2:12 And fast by him shall the tribe of Simeon pitch
Numbers2:13 and his host and the number of them forty nine thousand and three hundred.
Numbers2:14 And the tribe of Gad also: And the captain over the sons of Gad
Numbers2:15 and his host and the number of them forty five thousand six hundred and fifty.
Numbers2:16 So that all the number that pertain unto the host of Ruben
Numbers2:17 And the tabernacle of witness with the host of the Levites
Numbers2:18 On the west side
Numbers2:19 and his host and the number of them forty thousand and five hundred.
Numbers2:20 And fast by him
Numbers2:21 and his host and the number of them thirty two thousand and two hundred.
Numbers2:22 And the tribe of BenJamin also: and the captain over the sons of BenJamin
Numbers2:23 and his host and the number of them thirty five thousand and four hundred.
Numbers2:24 All the number that pertained unto the host of Ephraim
Numbers2:25 And the standard and the host of Dan shall lie on the north side with their companies: and the captain over the children of Dan
Numbers2:26 and his host and the number of them sixty two thousand and seven hundred.
Numbers2:27 And fast by him shall the tribe of Asser pitch: and the captain over the sons of Asser
Numbers2:28 and his host and the number of them forty one thousand and five hundred.
Numbers2:29 And the tribe of Naphtali also
Numbers2:30 and his host and the number of them fifty three thousand and four hundred.
Numbers2:31 So that the whole number of all that pertained unto the host of Dan
Numbers2:32 These are the sums of the children of Israel in the houses of their fathers: even all the numbers of the hosts with their companies six hundred thousand three thousand five hundred and fifty.
Numbers2:33 And yet the Levites were not numbered among the children of Israel
Numbers2:34 And the children of Israel did according to all that the LORD commanded Moses
Numbers3:1 These are the generations of Aaron and Moses
Numbers3:2 and these are the names of the sons of Aaron: Nadab the eldest son
Numbers3:3 These are the names of the sons of Aaron which were priests anointed and their hands filled to minister
Numbers3:4 but Nadab and Abihu died before the LORD
Numbers3:5 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers3:6 bring the tribe of Levi
Numbers3:7 and upon all the multitude
Numbers3:8 And they shall wait upon all the apparel of the tabernacle of witness
Numbers3:9 And thou shalt give the Levites unto Aaron and his sons
Numbers3:10 And thou shalt appoint Aaron and his sons to wait on their priests' office: and the stranger that cometh nigh
Numbers3:11 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers3:12 behold
Numbers3:13 because all the first born are mine: for the same day that I smote all the firstborn in the land of Egypt
Numbers3:14 And the LORD spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai saying:
Numbers3:15 Number the children of Levi in the houses of their fathers and kindreds
Numbers3:16 And Moses numbered them at the word of the LORD
Numbers3:17 And these are the names of the children of Levi: Gerson
Numbers3:18 And these are the names of the children of Gerson in their kindreds: Libni and Semei.
Numbers3:19 And the sons of Cahath in their kindred were Amram
Numbers3:20 And the sons of Merari in their kindreds were Maheli and Musi. These are the kindreds of Levi in the houses of their fathers.
Numbers3:21 And of Gerson came the kindred of the Libnites and the Semeites
Numbers3:22 And the sum of them (when all the males were told) from a month old and above
Numbers3:23 And the kindreds of the Gersonites pitched behind the habitation westward.
Numbers3:24 And the captain of the most ancient house among the Gersonites
Numbers3:25 And the office of the children of Gerson in the tabernacle of witness was the habitation and the tent with the covering thereof and the hanging of the door of the tabernacle of witness
Numbers3:26 and the hangings of the court
Numbers3:27 And of Cahath came the kindred of the Amramites and the kindred of the Jezeharites and of the Hebronites and of the Usielites: And these are the kindreds of the Cahathites.
Numbers3:28 And the number of all the males from a month old and above
Numbers3:29 And the kindred of the children of Cahath
Numbers3:30 And the captain in the most ancient house of the kindreds of the Cahathites
Numbers3:31 and their office was: to keep the ark
Numbers3:32 And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest
Numbers3:33 And of Merari came the kindreds of the Mahelites and of the Musites: and these are the kindreds of the Merarites.
Numbers3:34 And the number of them (when all the males from a month old and above was told) drew unto six thousand and two hundred.
Numbers3:35 And the captain of the most ancient house among the kindreds of the Merarites
Numbers3:36 And the office of the sons of Merari was: the boards of the dwelling and the bars
Numbers3:37 and the pillars of the court round about and their sockets
Numbers3:38 But on the forefront of the habitation and before the tabernacle of witness eastward
Numbers3:39 And the whole sum of the Levites which Moses and Aaron numbered
Numbers3:40 And the LORD said unto Moses: Number all the first born that are males among the children of Israel
Numbers3:41 And thou shalt appoint the Levites to me the LORD
Numbers3:42 And Moses numbered as the LORD commanded him
Numbers3:43 And all the firstborn males
Numbers3:44 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers3:45 take the Levites for all the firstborn of the children of Israel
Numbers3:46 And for the redeeming of the two hundred and seventy three which are more than the Levites in the firstborn of the children of Israel
Numbers3:47 take five sicles of every piece
Numbers3:48 And give the money wherewith the odd number of them is redeemed
Numbers3:49 And Moses took the redemption money of the overplus that were more than the Levites
Numbers3:50 among the firstborn of the children of Israel: and it came to a thousand three hundred and sixty five sicles
Numbers3:51 And he gave that redemption money unto Aaron and his sons at the word of the LORD
Numbers4:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron
Numbers4:2 and bade them take the sum of the children of Cahath from among the sons of Levi
Numbers4:3 all that were able to war
Numbers4:4 even in the most holy place. (This shall be the office of the Kahath in the tabernacle of witness which is most holy.)
Numbers4:5 And when the host removeth
Numbers4:6 and shall put thereon a covering of taxus' skins
Numbers4:7 And upon the shew table
Numbers4:8 and they shall spread upon them a covering of purple
Numbers4:9 And they shall take a cloth of jacinth and cover the candlestick of light and her lamps and her snuffers
Numbers4:10 and shall put upon her and on all her instruments
Numbers4:11 And upon the golden altar they shall spread a cloth of Jacinth
Numbers4:12 And they shall take all the things which they occupy to minister with in the holy place
Numbers4:13 And they shall take away the ashes out of the altar
Numbers4:14 and put about it
Numbers4:15 And when Aaron and his sons have made an end of covering the sanctuary and all things of the sanctuary
Numbers4:16 And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest
Numbers4:17 And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron saying:
Numbers4:18 destroy not the tribe of the kindreds of the Cahathites
Numbers4:19 But thus do unto them that they may live and not die
Numbers4:20 But let them not go in to see when they cover the sanctuary
Numbers4:21 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers4:22 Take the sum of the children of Gerson
Numbers4:23 from thirty year and above
Numbers4:24 And this is the service of the kindred of the Gersonites
Numbers4:25 They shall bear the curtains of the dwelling and the roof of the tabernacle of witness and his covering and the covering of taxus' skins that is on high(an hye) above upon it
Numbers4:26 and the hanging of the court and the hanging of the gate of the court that is round about the dwelling and the altar
Numbers4:27 And at the mouth of Aaron and his sons
Numbers4:28 And this is the service of the kindred of the children of the Gersonites in the tabernacle of witness
Numbers4:29 And thou shalt number the sons of Merari in their kindreds and in the houses of their fathers
Numbers4:30 from thirty years and above unto fifty. All that is able to go forth in war
Numbers4:31 And this is the charge that they must wait upon in all that they must serve in the tabernacle of witness: The boards of the dwelling
Numbers4:32 and the pillars of the court round about
Numbers4:33 This is the service of the kindreds of the sons of Merari in all their service in the tabernacle of witness by the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.
Numbers4:34 And Moses and Aaron and the princes of the multitude numbered the sons of the Cahathites in their kindreds and houses of their fathers
Numbers4:35 from thirty year and above unto fifty
Numbers4:36 And the number of them in their kindreds were two thousand
Numbers4:37 These are the numbers of the kindreds of the Cahathites
Numbers4:38 And the sons of Gerson were numbered in their kindreds and in the houses of their fathers
Numbers4:39 from thirty year up unto fifty
Numbers4:40 And the number of them in their kindreds
Numbers4:41 This is the number of the kindreds of the sons of Gerson
Numbers4:42 And the kindreds of the sons of Merari were numbered in their kindreds and in the houses of their fathers
Numbers4:43 from thirty year up unto fifty. All that were able to go forth with the host
Numbers4:44 And the number of them was in their kindreds
Numbers4:45 This is the number of the kindreds of the sons of Merari
Numbers4:46 The whole sum which Moses
Numbers4:47 from thirty year up unto fifty every man to do his office and service and to bear his burthen in the tabernacle of witness:
Numbers4:48 was eight thousand
Numbers4:49 which they numbered at the commandment of the LORD by the hand of Moses every man unto his service and burthen: as the LORD commanded Moses.
Numbers5:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers5:2 command the children of Israel that they put out of the host
Numbers5:3 whether they be males or females ye shall put them out of the host
Numbers5:4 And the children of Israel did so
Numbers5:5 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers5:6 speak unto the children of Israel: whether it be man or woman
Numbers5:7 then they shall knowledge their sins which they have done
Numbers5:8 But and if he that maketh the amends have no man to do it to
Numbers5:9 And all heave offerings of all the hallowed things which the children of Israel bring unto the priest
Numbers5:10 and every man's hallowed things shall be his own
Numbers5:11 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers5:12 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers5:13 so that another man lie with her fleshly and the thing be hid from the eyes of her husband and is not come to light that she is defiled (for there is no witness against her) in as much as she was not taken with the manner
Numbers5:14 and the spirit of jealousy cometh upon him and he is jealous over his wife and she defiled
Numbers5:15 Then let her husband bring her unto the priest and bring an offering for her: the tenth part of an Epha of barley meal
Numbers5:16 And let the priest bring her and set her before the LORD
Numbers5:17 and let him take holy water in an earthen vessel and of the dust that is in the floor of the habitation
Numbers5:18 And the priest shall set the wife before the LORD and uncover her head
Numbers5:19 If no man have lien with thee neither hast gone aside
Numbers5:20 But and if thou hast gone aside behind thine husband and art defiled and some other man hath lien with thee beside thine husband
Numbers5:21 (and let the priest conjure her with the conjuration of the curse and say unto her) the LORD make thee a curse and a conjuration among thy people: so that the LORD make thy thigh rot
Numbers5:22 and this bitter cursing water go into the bowels of thee
Numbers5:23 And the priest shall write this curse in a bill and wash it out in the bitter water.
Numbers5:24 And when the cursing water is in her that it is bitter
Numbers5:25 then let the priest take the jealousy offering out of the wife's hand
Numbers5:26 and he shall take an handful of the memorial offering and burn it upon the altar
Numbers5:27 and when he hath made her drink the water. If she be defiled and have trespassed against her husband
Numbers5:28 And if she be not defiled but is clean
Numbers5:29 This is the law of jealousy
Numbers5:30 or when the spirit of jealousy cometh upon a man
Numbers5:31 and the man shall be guiltless
Numbers6:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses saying:
Numbers6:2 speak unto children of Israel and say unto them: when either man or woman appointeth to vow a vow of abstinence for to abstain unto the LORD
Numbers6:3 he shall abstain from wine and strong drink
Numbers6:4 Moreover he shall eat nothing that is made of the vine tree
Numbers6:5 And as long as the vow of his abstinence endureth
Numbers6:6 As long as he abstaineth unto the LORD he shall come at no dead body:
Numbers6:7 he shall not make himself unclean at the death of his father
Numbers6:8 And therefore as long as his abstinence lasteth
Numbers6:9 And if it fortune that any man by chance die suddenly before him
Numbers6:10 And the eighth day he shall bring two turtles or two young pigeons to the priest
Numbers6:11 And the priest shall offer the one for a sinoffering and the other for a burntoffering and make an atonement for him
Numbers6:12 and he shall abstain unto the LORD the time of his abstinency
Numbers6:13 This is the law of the abstainer
Numbers6:14 and he shall bring his offering unto the LORD: an he lamb of a year old without blemish for a burntoffering and a she lamb of a year old without blemish for a sinoffering
Numbers6:15 and a basket of sweet bread of fine flour mingled with oil and wafers of sweet bread anointed with oil with meatofferings and drinkofferings that long thereto.
Numbers6:16 And the priest shall bring him before the LORD and offer his sinoffering and his burntoffering
Numbers6:17 and shall offer the ram for a peaceoffering unto the LORD with the basket of sweet bread
Numbers6:18 And the abstainer shall shave his head in the door of the tabernacle of witness and shall take the hair of his sober head and put it in the fire which is under the peaceoffering.
Numbers6:19 Then the priest shall take the sodden shoulder of the ram and one sweet cake out of the basket and one sweet wafer also and put them in the hand of the abstainer after he hath shaven his abstinence off
Numbers6:20 and the priest shall wave them unto the LORD
Numbers6:21 This is the law of the abstainer which hath vowed his offering unto the LORD for his abstinence
Numbers6:22 And the LORD talked with Moses saying:
Numbers6:23 speak unto Aaron and his sons saying: of this wise ye shall bless the children of Israel saying unto them.
Numbers6:24 The LORD(lorde) bless thee and keep thee.
Numbers6:25 The LORD(lorde) make his face shine upon thee and be merciful unto thee.
Numbers6:26 The LORD(lorde) lift up his countenance upon thee
Numbers6:27 For ye shall put my name upon the children of Israel
