Acts27:30 As the shipmen were about to flee out of the ship
Acts27:31 Paul said unto the under-captain and the soldiers: except these abide in the ship ye cannot be safe.
Acts27:32 Then the soldiers cut off the rope of the boat
Acts27:33 And in the meantime
Acts27:34 wherefore I pray you to take meat: for this no doubt is for your health
Acts27:35 And when he had thus spoken he took bread and gave thanks to God in presence of(before) them all
Acts27:36 Then were they all of good cheer
Acts27:37 We were all together in the ship
Acts27:38 (And) When they had eaten enough
Acts27:39 When it was day they knew not the land
Acts27:40 And when they had taken up the anchors
Acts27:41 but they fell into(chanced on) a place
Acts27:42 The soldiers' counsel was to kill the prisoners lest any of them
Acts27:43 but the under-captain willing to save Paul kept them from their purpose
Acts27:44 And the other he commanded to go
Acts28:1 And when they were scaped (
Acts28:2 (And) The people of the country shewed us no little kindness
Acts28:3 (And) When Paul had gathered a bundle of sticks; And put them into the fire
Acts28:4 When the men of the country saw the worm hang on his hand
Acts28:5 And(But) he shook off the vermin into the fire
Acts28:6 (Howbeit) They waited when he should have swollen
Acts28:7 In the same quarters
Acts28:8 (And) It fortuned that the father of Publius lay sick of a fever
Acts28:9 When this was done
Acts28:10 And they did us great honour. And when we departed
Acts28:11 After three months we departed in a ship of Alexandry
Acts28:12 And when we came to Ciracusa
Acts28:13 (And) from whence(thence) we sailed about(fetched a compass) and came to Regium. And after one day the south wind blew
Acts28:14 where we found brethren
Acts28:15 And from thence
Acts28:16 (And) When he came to Rome
Acts28:17 (And) It fortuned after three days (that) Paul called the chief of the jews together.(to gether) (And) When they were come
Acts28:18 Which when they had examined me
Acts28:19 but when the jews cried contrary: I was constrained to appeal unto Cesar. Not because(not as though) I had ought to accuse my people of.
Acts28:20 For this cause have I called for you (
Acts28:21 And they said unto him: We neither received letters out of Jewry pertaining unto thee
Acts28:22 But we will hear of thee what thou thinkest. For we have heard of this sect
Acts28:23 (And) When they had appointed him a day
Acts28:24 And some believed the things which were spoken
Acts28:25 When they agreed not among themselves
Acts28:26 saying: Go unto this people and say: with your ears shall ye hear
Acts28:27 For the heart of this people is waxed gross
Acts28:28 Be it known therefore unto you
Acts28:29 And when he had said that
Acts28:30 But(And) Paul dwelt (full) two years in his lodging. And received all that came to him
Acts28:31 preaching the kingdom of God
Romans1:1 Paul the servant of Jesus Christ
Romans1:2 which he promised afore by his prophets
Romans1:3 that make mention of his son
Romans1:4 and declared to be the son of God with power of the holy ghost
Romans1:5 by whom we have received grace and apostleship
Romans1:6 of the which number are ye(of the which heathen are ye a part) also
Romans1:7 To all you of Rome beloved of God
Romans1:8 First verily I thank my God thorow Jesus Christ for you all
Romans1:9 For God is my witness
Romans1:10 beseeching that at one time or another
Romans1:11 For I long to see you
Romans1:12 (that is) that I might have consolation together(be conforted) with you
Romans1:13 I would that ye should know
Romans1:14 For I am debtor both to the greeks
Romans1:15 Likewise
Romans1:16 For I am not ashamed of the Gospell of Christ
Romans1:17 For by it the righteousness which cometh of(that is of value before) God is opened
Romans1:18 For the wrath of God of heaven appeareth(wrath of God appeareth from heaven) against all ungodliness and unrighteousness of men which withhold the truth(truth of God) in unrighteousness
Romans1:19 seeing that that
Romans1:20 For(So that) his invisible things (that is to say
Romans1:21 inasmuch as when they knew God
Romans1:22 When they counted themselves wise
Romans1:23 and turned the glory of the immortal God
Romans1:24 For this cause(Wherefore) God (like wise) gave them up unto their hearts' lusts
Romans1:25 which turned his truth unto a lie
Romans1:26 For this cause God gave them up unto shameful lusts. For even their women did change the natural use unto the unnatural.
Romans1:27 And likewise also the men left the natural use of the woman
Romans1:28 And as it seemed not good unto them to be aknown of(they regarded not to know) God
Romans1:29 being full of all unrighteous doing
Romans1:30 backbiters
Romans1:31 without understanding
Romans1:32 Which men
Romans2:1 Therefore art thou inexcusable O man whosoever thou be that judgest. For in the same wherein thou judgest another
Romans2:2 But we are sure that the judgement of God is according to truth
Romans2:3 Thinkest thou (this) O thou man that judgest them which do such things and yet doest even the very same
Romans2:4 Other(Either) despisest thou the riches of his goodness and patience
Romans2:5 But thou after thine hard heart that cannot repent
Romans2:6 which will reward every man according to his deeds
Romans2:7 that is to say praise
Romans2:8 But unto them that are rebellious
Romans2:9 tribulation(trouble) and anguish upon the soul of every man that doth evil. Of the jew first: And also of the gentile.
Romans2:10 To every man that doth good shall come praise
Romans2:11 For there is no partiality with God:(there is no respect of persons before God)
Romans2:12 But whosoever hath sinned without law
Romans2:13 For before God they are not righteous which hear the law: but they which do(doers of) the law shall be justified.
Romans2:14 For if the gentiles which have no law
Romans2:15 which shew the deed(work) of the law written in their hearts: While their conscience beareth witness unto them
Romans2:16 at the day when God shall judge the secrets of men
Romans2:17 Behold
Romans2:18 and knowest his will
Romans2:19 And believest that thou thyself art a guide unto the blind
Romans2:20 an informer of them which lack discretion
Romans2:21 Now teachest thou another: but teachest not thyself.(But thou which teachest another
Romans2:22 Thou sayest
Romans2:23 Thou abhorrest images
Romans2:24 For the name of God is evil spoken of among the gentiles thorow you as it is written.
Romans2:25 Circumcision verily availeth if thou keep the law: But if thou break the law thy circumcision is made(become) uncircumcision.
Romans2:26 Therefore if the uncircumcised keep the right things contained in the law: shall not his uncircumcision be counted for circumcision?
Romans2:27 And shall not uncircumcision which is by nature (if it keep the law)(and fulfilleth the law) judge thee
Romans2:28 For he is not a jew
Romans2:29 But he is a Jew which is hid within
Romans3:1 What preferment(furtherance) than hath the jew? other what advantageth circumcision?
Romans3:2 Surely very much. First unto them was committed the word of God.(what God spake)
Romans3:3 What then though some of them did not believe? shall their unbelief make the promise of God without effect?
Romans3:4 God forbid. Let God be true
Romans3:5 If our unrighteousness make the righteousness of God more excellent: what shall we say? Is God unrighteous which taketh vengeance?(Is God then unrighteous
Romans3:6 God forbid. For how then shall God judge the world?
Romans3:7 if the verity(trueth) of God appear more excellent thorow my lie
Romans3:8 and say not rather (as men evil speak of us
Romans3:9 What say we then? Are we better than they? no
Romans3:10 as it is written: There is none righteous
Romans3:11 There is none that understandeth
Romans3:12 they are all gone out of the way
Romans3:13 Their throat is an open sepulchre
Romans3:14 whose mouths are full of cursing and bitterness.
Romans3:15 Their feet are swift to shed blood.
Romans3:16 Destruction and wretchedness are in their ways:
Romans3:17 And the way of peace have they not known.
Romans3:18 There is no fear of God before their eyes.
Romans3:19 Yea and we know that whatsoever the law saith
Romans3:20 because that by the deeds of the law
Romans3:21 Now verily is the righteousness that cometh of God declared with out the fulfilling of(without adding to) the law having witness yet of the law
Romans3:22 The righteousness no doubt which is good before God cometh by the faith of Jesus Christ unto all
Romans3:23 For there is no difference
Romans3:24 but are justified freely(without deserving) by his grace
Romans3:25 whom God hath made a seat of mercy thorow faith in his blood
Romans3:26 which God did suffer to shew at this time: the righteousness that is allowed of him
Romans3:27 Where is then thy rejoicing? It is excluded. By what law? by the law of works? Nay: but by the law of faith.
Romans3:28 We suppose therefore (we hold) that a man is justified by faith without the deeds(works) of the law.
Romans3:29 Is he the God of the jews only? Is he not also the God of the gentiles? He is no doubt
Romans3:30 For it is God only which justifieth circumcision
Romans3:31 Do we then destroy the law thorow faith? God forbid. (But) We rather maintain the law.
Romans4:1 What shall we say then
Romans4:2 If Abraham were justified by deeds
Romans4:3 For what saith the scripture? Abraham believed God
Romans4:4 To him that worketh is the reward not reckoned of favour: but of duty.
Romans4:5 To him that worketh not
Romans4:6 Even as David describeth the blessedfulness of a(the) man
Romans4:7 Blessed are they
Romans4:8 Blessed is that man to whom the Lord imputeth not sin.
Romans4:9 Came this blessedness then upon the circumcised or upon the uncircumcised? We say verily how that faith was reckoned to Abraham
Romans4:10 How was it reckoned? in the time of circumcision? or in the time before he was circumcised? Not in time of circumcision: but when he was yet uncircumcised.
Romans4:11 And he received the sign(token) of circumcision
Romans4:12 And that he might be the father of the circumcised: not because they are circumcised only: but because they walk also in the steps of that faith
Romans4:13 For the promise that he should be heir of the world was not given to Abraham
Romans4:14 For if they which are of the law be heirs
Romans4:15 Because the law causeth wrath. For where no law is
Romans4:16 Therefore by faith is the inheritance given
Romans4:17 As it is written: I have ordained(made) thee a father to many nations
Romans4:18 Which Abraham
Romans4:19 And he fainted not in the faith
Romans4:20 He staggered not at the promise of God thorow unbelief: But was made strong in the faith
Romans4:21 that he which had made the promised was able also to make it good.(that what he had promised
Romans4:22 And therefore was it reckoned to him for righteousness.
Romans4:23 It is not written for him only
Romans4:24 but also for us
Romans4:25 Which was delivered for our sins
Romans5:1 Because therefore that we are justified by faith we are at peace with God thorow our Lord Jesus Christ:
Romans5:2 by whom we have a way in thorow(an entrance in) faith unto this favour(grace) wherein we stand and rejoice in hope of the praise that shall be given (of the children) of God.
Romans5:3 Neither do we so only: but also we rejoice in tribulation: For we know that tribulation bringeth patience
Romans5:4 patience bringeth fealing
Romans5:5 And hope maketh not ashamed
Romans5:6 For when we were yet weak according to the time: Christ died for us which were ungodly.
Romans5:7 Yet scarce will any man die for a righteous man. Peradventure for a good man durst a man die.
Romans5:8 But God setteth out his love that he hath to us; Seeing that while we were yet sinners; (according to the time) Christ died for us.
Romans5:9 Much more then now (seeing we are justified(made righteous) in his blood) shall we be preserved(saved) from wrath thorow him.
Romans5:10 For if when we were enemies
Romans5:11 Not only so
Romans5:12 Wherefore as by one man sin entered into the world
Romans5:13 For even unto the time of the law was sin in the world: but sin was not regarded
Romans5:14 nevertheless death reigned from Adam to Moses
Romans5:15 But the gift is not like as the sin. For if thorow the sin of one
Romans5:16 And the gift is not over one sin
Romans5:17 For if by the sin of one
Romans5:18 Likewise then as by the sin of one
Romans5:19 For as by one man's disobedience many became sinners: so by the obedience of one shall many be made righteous.
Romans5:20 (But) The law in the mean time entered in that sin should increase. And(Neverthelater) where abundance of sin was
Romans5:21 That as sin had reigned unto death
Romans6:1 What shall we say then? shall we continue in sin
Romans6:2 God forbid. How shall we that are dead as touching sin live any longer therein?
Romans6:3 Remember ye not that all we which are baptised in the name of Christ Jesu
Romans6:4 We are buried with him by baptism for to die: That (likewise) as Christ was raised up from death by the glory of the father: even so we also should walk in a new life.
Romans6:5 For if we be graft in death like unto him: even so must we be in the resurrection.
Romans6:6 This we must remember
Romans6:7 For he that is dead
Romans6:8 Wherefore if we be dead with Christ
Romans6:9 remembering that Christ once raised from death
Romans6:10 For as touching that he died
Romans6:11 Likewise imagine ye also
Romans6:12 Let not sin reign therefore in your mortal bodies
Romans6:13 Neither give ye your members as instruments(weapons) of unrighteousness unto sin: But give yourselves unto God
Romans6:14 Sin shall not have power over you.(Let not sin have power over you) For ye are not under the law
Romans6:15 What then? Shall we sin
Romans6:16 Remember ye not how that to whomsoever ye commit yourselves as servants to obey
Romans6:17 God be thanked. (
Romans6:18 Ye are then made free from sin
Romans6:19 I will speak grossly because of the infirmity(weakness) of your flesh. As ye have given your members servants to uncleanness and to iniquity
Romans6:20 For when ye were servants of sin
Romans6:21 What fruit had ye then in those things
Romans6:22 But now are ye delivered(be free) from sin
Romans6:23 For the reward of sin is death: but eternal life is the gift of God
Romans7:1 Remember ye not brethren (I speak to them that know the law) how that the law hath power over a man as long as it endureth:
Romans7:2 For the woman which is in subjection to a man
Romans7:3 So then if while the man liveth she couple herself with another man
Romans7:4 Even so ye my brethren
Romans7:5 (For) When we were in the flesh
Romans7:6 But now are we delivered(lowsed) from the law
Romans7:7 What shall we say then? is the law sin? God forbid: but I knew not what sin meant but by the law. For I had not known what lust had meant
Romans7:8 But sin took an occasion by the means of the commandment
Romans7:9 I once lived without law: but when the commandment came
Romans7:10 And the very same commandment which was ordained(given me) unto life
Romans7:11 For sin took occasion by the means of the commandment and so deceived me
Romans7:12 Wherefore the law is holy
Romans7:13 Was that then which is good made death unto me? God forbid. Nay sin was death unto me
Romans7:14 For we know that the law is spiritual: but I am carnal
Romans7:15 because I wot(know) not what I do. For what I would
Romans7:16 If I do now that which I would not
Romans7:17 So then now it is not I that do it
Romans7:18 For I know that in me (that is to say in my flesh) dwelleth no good thing. To will is present with me: but I find no means to perform that which is good.
Romans7:19 For I do not that good thing which I would: but that evil do I
Romans7:20 Finally
Romans7:21 I find then by the law that when I would do good
Romans7:22 I delight in the law of God
Romans7:23 But I see another law in my members rebelling against the law of my mind
Romans7:24 O wretched man that I am: who shall deliver me from this body of death?
Romans7:25 I thank God by(thorow) Jesus Christ our Lord: So then I myself in my mind serve the law of God
Romans8:1 There is then no damnation to them which are in Christ Jesu
Romans8:2 For the law of the spirit
Romans8:3 For what the law could not do inasmuch as it was weak because of the flesh: that performed God
Romans8:4 that the righteousness required of the law
Romans8:5 For they that are carnal
Romans8:6 To be carnally minded is death; and(But) to be spiritually minded is life
Romans8:7 because that the fleshly mind is enmity against God: For it is not obedient to(subdued unto) the law of God
Romans8:8 So then they that are given to the flesh
Romans8:9 But ye are not given to the flesh; But to the spirit: If so be that the spirit of God dwell in you. If there be any man that hath not the spirit of Christ
Romans8:10 If Christ be in you
Romans8:11 Wherefore if the spirit of him that raised up Jesus from death
Romans8:12 Therefore brethren we are now debtors
Romans8:13 For if ye live after the flesh
Romans8:14 for as many as are led by the spirit of God
Romans8:15 For ye have not received the spirit of bondage to fear any more
Romans8:16 The same spirit certifieth our spirit that we are the sons of God.
Romans8:17 If we be sons
Romans8:18 For I suppose that the afflictions of this life
Romans8:19 Also the fervent desire(longing) of the creatures abideth looking when the sons of God shall appear
Romans8:20 because the creatures are subdued to vanity against their will: but for his will which subdued(subdueth) them in hope.
Romans8:21 For the very creatures shall be delivered(free) from the bondage of corruption
Romans8:22 For we know that every creature groaneth with us also
Romans8:23 Not they only
Romans8:24 For we are saved by hope. But hope that is seen is no hope. For how can a man hope for that which he seeth?
Romans8:25 but and if we hope for that we see not
Romans8:26 Likewise the spirit also helpeth our infirmities. For we know not
Romans8:27 And he that searcheth the hearts knoweth what is the meaning(mind) of the spirit: for he maketh intercession for the saints according to the pleasure of God.
Romans8:28 For we know well that all things work(serve) for the best unto them that love God
Romans8:29 For those which he knew before
Romans8:30 Moreover which he appointed(ordained) before
Romans8:31 What shall we then say unto these things? if God be on our side: who can be against us?
Romans8:32 which spared not his own son
Romans8:33 Who shall lay anything to the charge of God's(goddes) chosen? It is God that justifieth:(maketh righteous)
Romans8:34 who then shall condemn? it is Christ which is dead; Yea rather which is risen again
Romans8:35 Who shall separate us from God's love?(the love of god) shall tribulation? or anguish? or persecution
Romans8:36 As it is written: For thy sake are we killed all day long
Romans8:37 Nevertheless in all these things we overcome strongly thorow his help that loved us.
Romans8:38 Yea and I am sure that neither death
Romans8:39 neither height
Romans9:1 I Say the truth in Christ and lie not
Romans9:2 that I have great heaviness
Romans9:3 For I have wished myself to be cursed from Christ for my brethren
Romans9:4 Which are the Israelites
Romans9:5 whose also are the fathers
Romans9:6 I speak not these things as though the words of God had took(taken) none effect. For they are not all Israelites which came of Israel;
Romans9:7 Neither are they all children straightway because they are the seed of Abraham: But in Isaac shall thy seed be called
Romans9:8 that is to say; They which are the children of the flesh
Romans9:9 For this is a word of promise
Romans9:10 Neither was it to with her only: but also when Rebecca was with child by one
Romans9:11 yer the children were born
Romans9:12 the elder shall serve the younger.(The greater shall serve the less)
Romans9:13 As it is written: Jacob he loved
Romans9:14 What shall we say then? is there any unrighteousness with God? God forbid.
Romans9:15 For he saith to Moses: I will shew mercy to whom I shew mercy: And will have compassion on whom I have compassion.
Romans9:16 So lieth it not then in a man's will
Romans9:17 For the scripture saith unto Pharaoh: Even for this same purpose(this cause) have I stirred thee up
Romans9:18 So hath he mercy on whom he will. And whom he will he maketh hard hearted.(hardeneth)
Romans9:19 Thou wilt say then unto me: why then blameth he us yet? For who can resist his will?
Romans9:20 But O man what art thou
Romans9:21 Hath not the potter power over the clay
Romans9:22 Even so
Romans9:23 that he might declare the riches of his glory on the vessels of mercy
Romans9:24 that is to say
Romans9:25 As he saith in Osee: I will call them my people which were not my people: and her beloved which was not beloved.
Romans9:26 And it shall come to pass in the place where it was said unto them: Ye are not my people
Romans9:27 But Esaias crieth for(concerning) Israel
Romans9:28 He finisheth the work verily and maketh it short in righteousness. For a short word will God make on earth.
Romans9:29 And as Esaias said before: Except the Lord of Sabaoth had left us seed
Romans9:30 What shall we say then? we say that the gentiles which followed not righteousness
Romans9:31 But Israel which followed the law of righteousness
Romans9:32 And wherefore? Because they sought it not by faith: but as it were by the works of the law.(but as it were out of the deserving of works) For they have stumbled at the stumbling stone.
Romans9:33 As it is written: Behold I put in Syon a stumbling stone
Romans10:1 Brethren my heart's desire
Romans10:2 For I bear them record that they have a fervent mind to Godward
Romans10:3 For they are ignorant of(know not) the righteousness which is allowed(which availeth) before God
Romans10:4 For Christ is the end of the law to justify all that believe.(law
Romans10:5 Moses describeth(writeth of) the righteousness which cometh of the law
Romans10:6 But the righteousness which cometh of faith
Romans10:7 Other(or) who shall descend(go down) into the deep? That is nothing else but to fetch up Christ from death.
Romans10:8 But what saith the scripture? The word is nigh thee
Romans10:9 For if thou shalt knowledge with thy mouth(mought) that Jesus is the Lord
Romans10:10 For the belief of the heart justifieth: and to knowledge with the mouth maketh a man safe.(For if a man believe from the heart
Romans10:11 For the scripture saith: whosoever believeth on him
Romans10:12 There is no difference between the jew and the gentile. For one is Lord of all
Romans10:13 For whosoever shall call on the name of the Lord shall be safe.(saved)
Romans10:14 (But) How shall they call on him
Romans10:15 And how shall they preach except they be sent? As it is written: how beautiful are the feet of them which bring glad tidings of peace
Romans10:16 But they have not all obeyed to the gospel.(gospell) For Esaias saith: Lord who shall believe our sayings?(preaching?)
Romans10:17 So then faith cometh by hearing
Romans10:18 But I ask: have they not heard? No doubt
Romans10:19 But I demand whether Israel did know or not? First Moses saith: I will provoke you for to envy by them that are no people
Romans10:20 Esaias after that is bold and saith. I am found of them that sought me not
Romans10:21 And against Israel he saith: All day long have I stretched forth my hands unto a people that believeth not
Romans11:1 I say then: hath God cast away his people? God forbid. For even I verily am an Israelite of the seed of Abraham
Romans11:2 God hath not cast away his people which he knew before. Other(Either) wot ye not what the scripture saith by the mouth of Helias
Romans11:3 Lord they have killed thy prophets and digged down thine altars: and I am left only
Romans11:4 But what saith the answer of God to him again? I have reserved unto me seven thousand men which have not bowed their knees(the knee) to baal.
Romans11:5 Even so at this time is there a remnant left thorow the election of grace.
Romans11:6 If it be of grace then is it not by the deserving of works.(then is it not of works) For then were favour(grace) no more favour.(grace.) If it be by the deserving of works
Romans11:7 What then? Israel hath not obtained that that he sought. No but yet the election hath obtained it. The remnant are blinded
Romans11:8 according as it is written: God hath given them the spirit of unquietness: eyes that they should not see
Romans11:9 And David saith: Let their table be made a snare to take them withal
Romans11:10 Let their eyes be blinded that they see not: and ever bow down their backs.
Romans11:11 I say then: Have they therefore stumbled that they should but fall only? God forbid: but thorow their fall is health(salvation) happened unto the gentiles for to provoke them withal.
Romans11:12 Wherefore if the fall of them
Romans11:13 I speak to you gentiles
Romans11:14 that might provoke them which are my flesh: and might save some of them.
Romans11:15 For if the casting away of them
Romans11:16 For if one piece be holy
Romans11:17 Though some of the branches be broken off
Romans11:18 boast(boost) not thyself against the branches. For if thou boast(boost) thyself
Romans11:19 Thou wilt say then: the branches are broken off
Romans11:20 Thou sayest well: because of unbelief they are broken off
Romans11:21 seeing that God spared not the natural branches
Romans11:22 Behold the kindness and rigorousness of God: on them which fell
Romans11:23 and they if they bide not still in unbelief shall be grafted in again. For God is of power to graft them in again.
Romans11:24 For if thou wast cut out of a natural wild olive tree
Romans11:25 I would not that this secret should be hid from you my brethren (lest ye should be wise in your own conceits) that partly blindness is happened in Israel
Romans11:26 And so all Israel shall be saved. As it is written: There shall come out of Sion he that doth deliver
Romans11:27 And this is my covenant unto them
Romans11:28 As concerning the gospel;(gospell) They are enemies for your sakes: but as touching the election
Romans11:29 For verily the gifts and calling of God are such
Romans11:30 for look
Romans11:31 even so now have they not believed the mercy which is happened unto you; That they also may obtain mercy.
Romans11:32 God hath wrapped all nations in(closed up all under) unbelief
Romans11:33 O the deepness of the abundant wisdom and knowledge off God: how incomprehensible(unsearchable) are his judgements
Romans11:34 For who hath known the mind of the Lord? or who was his counsellor?
Romans11:35 other who hath given unto him first
Romans11:36 For of him
Romans12:1 I beseech you therefore brethren by the mercifulness of God that ye make your bodies a quick sacrifice
Romans12:2 And fashion not yourselves like unto this world: But be ye changed in your shape
Romans12:3 For I say (thorow the grace that unto me given is) to every man among you
Romans12:4 As we have many members in one body: and all members have not one office:(one manner of operation)
Romans12:5 So we being many are one body in Christ: and every man (among ourselves) one another's members.
Romans12:6 Seeing that we have divers gifts according to the grace that is given unto us
Romans12:7 Let him that hath an office
Romans12:8 Let him that teacheth take heed to his doctrine. Let him that exhorteth give attendance to his exhortation. If any man give
Romans12:9 Let love be without dissimulation. Hate that which is evil
Romans12:10 Be kind one to(unto) another
Romans12:11 Let not that business which ye have in hand be tedious to you. Be fervent in the spirit. Apply yourselves to the time.
Romans12:12 Rejoice in hope. Be patient in tribulation
Romans12:13 Distribute unto the necessity of the saints. (and be ready to harbor.)
Romans12:14 Bless them which persecute you: bless but curse not.
Romans12:15 Be merry with them that are merry. Weep with them that weep.
Romans12:16 Be of like affection one towards another.(Be of one mind among your selves) Be not high minded
Romans12:17 Recompense to no man evil for evil. Provide aforehand things honest (not only before God
Romans12:18 If it be possible
Romans12:19 Dearly beloved avenge not yourselves but give room unto the wrath of God. For it is written: vengeance is mine
Romans12:20 Therefore if thine enemy hunger feed him: if he thirst
Romans12:21 Be not overcome of evil: But overcome evil with goodness.
Romans13:1 Let every soul submit himself unto the authority of the higher powers. (For) There is no power but of God. The powers that be
Romans13:2 Whosoever therefore resisteth power
Romans13:3 For rulers are not to be feared for good works but for evil. Wilt thou be without fear of the power? Do well then: and so shalt thou be praised of the same.
Romans13:4 For he is the minister of God
Romans13:5 Wherefore ye must needs obey
Romans13:6 (And) Even for this cause pay ye tribute. For they are God's(goddes) ministers
Romans13:7 Give to every man therefore his duty: Tribute to whom tribute belongeth: Custom to whom custom is due: fear to whom fear belongeth: Honour to whom honour pertaineth.
Romans13:8 Owe no thing to any man: but to love one another. For he that loveth another
Romans13:9 For these commandments: Thou shalt not commit advoutry:(not break wedlock) Thou shalt not kill: Thou shalt not steal: Thou shalt not bear false witness: Thou shalt not desire:(not lust) and so forth if there be any other commandment
Romans13:10 Love hurteth not his neighbor:(Love doth his neighbour no evil) Therefore is love the fulfilling of the law.
Romans13:11 This also we know
Romans13:12 The night is passed and(past
Romans13:13 Let us walk honestly as it were in the daylight: not in(not in excess of) eating and drinking: neither in chambering and wantonness: neither in strife and envying:
Romans13:14 but put ye on the Lord Jesus Christ. And make not provision for the flesh
Romans14:1 Him that is weak in the faith
Romans14:2 One believeth that he may eat all things. Another which is weak eateth herbs;
Romans14:3 Let not him that eateth
Romans14:4 What art thou that judgest another man's servant? Whether he stand or fall
Romans14:5 This man putteth difference between day and day: another man counteth all days alike. See that no man waver in his own mind.(meaning.)
Romans14:6 He that observeth one day more than another
Romans14:7 For none of us liveth his own servant: and also none(neither doth any) of us dieth(die) his own servant.
Romans14:8 If we live
Romans14:9 For Christ therefore died and rose again
Romans14:10 But why doest thou then judge thy brother? other why dost thou despise thy brother? We shall all be brought before the judgement seat of Christ.
Romans14:11 For it is written: As truly as I live saith the Lord
Romans14:12 So shall every one of us give accounts(acomptes) of himself to God.
Romans14:13 Let us not therefore
Romans14:14 For I know
Romans14:15 If thy brother be grieved with thy meat
Romans14:16 Suffer ye(Cause) not that your treasure (to) be evil spoken of.
Romans14:17 For the kingdom of God is not meat and drink
Romans14:18 For whosoever in these things serveth Christ
Romans14:19 Let us follow those things which make for peace: and things wherewith one may edify another.
Romans14:20 Destroy not the work of God for a little meat's sake. All things are pure: but it is evil for that man
Romans14:21 It is good neither to eat flesh
Romans14:22 Hast thou faith? have it with thyself before God. Happy is he that condemneth not himself in that thing which he alloweth.
Romans14:23 For he that maketh conscience
Romans15:1 We which are strong ought to bear the frailness of them which are weak
Romans15:2 Let every man please his neighbor unto his wealth and edifying.
Romans15:3 For Christ pleased not himself: but as it is written: The rebukes of them which rebuked thee
Romans15:4 Whatsoever things are written aforetime
Romans15:5 (The) God which is Lord of patience and consolation
Romans15:6 that ye all agreeing together
Romans15:7 Wherefore receive ye one another as Christ received us
Romans15:8 And I say that Jesus Christ was a minister of the circumcision for the truth of God
Romans15:9 And let the gentiles praise God for his(because of) mercy. As it is written: For this cause I will praise thee among the gentiles
Romans15:10 And again he saith: ye gentiles rejoice with his people.
Romans15:11 (And) Again
Romans15:12 And in another place Esaias saith: there shall be the root(rote) of Jesse
Romans15:13 The God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing
Romans15:14 I myself am full certified of you my brethren that ye yourselves are full of goodness
Romans15:15 Nevertheless brethren I have somewhat boldly written unto you
Romans15:16 for this purpose that I should be the minister of Jesu Christ among the gentiles
Romans15:17 I have therefore whereof I may rejoice in(boast myself thorow) Christ Jesu
Romans15:18 For I dare not speak of any of those things which Christ hath not wrought(not speak ought
Romans15:19 in mighty signs and wonders
Romans15:20 So have I enforced myself to preach the gospel
Romans15:21 but as it is written: To whom he was not spoken of
Romans15:22 For this cause I have been oft let (and am let as yet) to come unto you:
Romans15:23 but now seeing I have no more to do in these countries
Romans15:24 when I shall take my journey into Spayne
Romans15:25 Now go I unto Jerusalem
Romans15:26 For it hath pleased them of Macedonia and Achaia
Romans15:27 It hath pleased them verily
Romans15:28 When I have performed this
Romans15:29 And I am sure when I come
Romans15:30 I beseech you brethren for our Lord Jesu Christ's(Lorde Iesu Christes) sake
Romans15:31 that I may be delivered from them which believe not in Jewry; and that this my service
Romans15:32 that I may come unto you with joy
Romans15:33 The God of peace be with all you Amen.
Romans16:1 I commend unto you Phebe our sister (which is a minister of the congregation of Cencrea)
Romans16:2 that ye receive her in the Lord as it becometh saints
Romans16:3 Greet Prisca and Aquila my helpers in Christ Jesu
Romans16:4 which have for my life laid down their own necks. Unto whom(which) not I only give thanks: but also the congregations of the gentiles.
Romans16:5 Likewise greet all the company(congregation) that is in their house. Salute my well beloved Epenetes
Romans16:6 Greet Mary which bestowed much labour on us.
Romans16:7 Salute Andronicus
Romans16:8 Greet Amplias my beloved in the Lord.
Romans16:9 Salute Urban our helper in Christ
Romans16:10 Salute Apellas approved in Christ. Salute them which are of Aristobolus' household.
Romans16:11 Salute Herodion my kinsman. Greet them of the household of Narcissus which are in the Lord.
Romans16:12 Salute Triphena and Triphosa
Romans16:13 Salute Rufus chosen in the Lord
Romans16:14 Greet Asincritus
Romans16:15 Salute Philologus and Julia
Romans16:16 Salute one another among yourselves with an holy kiss. The congregations of Christ salute you.
Romans16:17 I beseech you brethren mark them which cause division
Romans16:18 For they that are such serve not the Lord Jesus Christ: but their own bellies. And with sweet preachings and flattering words deceive the hearts of the innocents:
Romans16:19 for your obedience is spoken of among(extendeth to)(published among) all men. I am glad no doubt of you.(Therefore am I glad) But yet I would have you wise unto that which is good. And to be innocent as concerning evil.
Romans16:20 The God of peace tread Satan under your feet in short time.(shortly.) The grace of our Lord Jesu Christ be with you.
Romans16:21 Timotheus my work fellow
Romans16:22 I Tercius salute you
Romans16:23 Gaius mine host and the host of all the(the whole) congregations
Romans16:24 The grace of our Lord Jesu Christ be with you all Amen.
Romans16:25 To him that is of power to establish you according to my gospel
Romans16:26 and(but) now is opened at this time and declared in(opened by) the scriptures of prophecy
Romans16:27 To the same God
1Corinthians1:1 Paul by vocation(called to be) an apostle of Jesus Christ thorow the will of God
1Corinthians1:2 Unto the congregation of God which is at Corinthum. To them that are sanctified in Jesus(Iesu) Christ
1Corinthians1:3 Grace be with you and peace from God our father
1Corinthians1:4 I thank my God always on your behalf for the favour(grace) of God which is given you by Jesus Christ
1Corinthians1:5 that in all things(points) ye are made rich by him
1Corinthians1:6 (even as the testimony of Jesus Christ was confirmed in you
1Corinthians1:7 so that ye are behind in no gift
1Corinthians1:8 which shall strength you unto the end
1Corinthians1:9 (For) God is faithful
1Corinthians1:10 I beseech you brethren in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ
1Corinthians1:11 It is shewed unto me (my brethren) of you by them that are of the house of Cloe
1Corinthians1:12 I speak of that which everyone of you sayth:(And this is it that I mean: how that commonly among you
1Corinthians1:13 Is Christ divided? was Paul crucified for you? other(either) were ye baptised in the name of Paul?
1Corinthians1:14 I thank God that I christened(have baptised) none of you
1Corinthians1:15 lest any should say that I in mine own name had baptised.
1Corinthians1:16 I baptised also the house of Stephana. Furthermore know I not whether I baptised any man (of you) or no.
1Corinthians1:17 For Christ sent me not to baptise
1Corinthians1:18 For the preaching(word) of the cross is to them that perish foolishness: but unto us which are saved
1Corinthians1:19 For it is written: I will destroy the wisdom of the wise and will cast away the understanding of the prudent.
1Corinthians1:20 Where is the wise man? where is the scribe? where is the searcher(disputers) of this world? Hath not God made the wisdom of this world foolishness?
1Corinthians1:21 For when the world thorow wisdom knew not God
1Corinthians1:22 For the jews require a sign
1Corinthians1:23 But we preach Christ crucified
1Corinthians1:24 but unto them which are called both of jews and greeks we preach Christ the power of God
1Corinthians1:25 For Godly foolishness(the foolishness of God) is wiser than men: And Godly weakness(the weakness of God) is stronger than are men.
1Corinthians1:26 Brethren look on your calling how that not many wise men after the flesh
1Corinthians1:27 But God hath chosen the foolish things of the world
1Corinthians1:28 And vile things of the world
1Corinthians1:29 that no flesh should rejoice in his presence.
1Corinthians1:30 And unto him pertain ye
1Corinthians1:31 That according as it is written: he which rejoiceth
1Corinthians2:1 And I brethren when I came to you
1Corinthians2:2 Neither shewed I myself that I knew any thing among you save(save onely) Jesus Christ
1Corinthians2:3 And I was among you in weakness
1Corinthians2:4 And my words
1Corinthians2:5 that your faith should not stand in the wisdom of men: but in the power of God.
1Corinthians2:6 We speak that which(That we speak of) is wisdom among them that are perfect: not the wisdom of this world neither of the rulers of this world (which goeth to nought
1Corinthians2:7 but we speak the wisdom of God
1Corinthians2:8 which wisdom none of the rulers of the world knew. For had they known it
1Corinthians2:9 but as it is written: The eye hath not seen
1Corinthians2:10 But God hath opened them unto us by his spirit. For the spirit searcheth all things
1Corinthians2:11 For what man knoweth the things of a man: save the spirit of a man which is within him? Even so the things of God knoweth no man
1Corinthians2:12 And we have not received the spirit of the world: but the spirit which cometh of God
1Corinthians2:13 which things also we speak
1Corinthians2:14 For the natural man perceiveth not the things of the spirit of God: For they are but foolishness unto him. Neither can he perceive them because he is spiritually examined:(can not perceive it: for it must be spiritually discerned)
1Corinthians2:15 but he that is spiritual discusseth all things: yet he himself is judged of no man.
1Corinthians2:16 For who knoweth the mind of the Lord
1Corinthians3:1 And I could not speak unto you brethren as unto spiritual: but as unto carnal
1Corinthians3:2 I gave you milk to drink and not meat. For ye then were not strong
1Corinthians3:3 For ye are yet carnal. As long verily as there is among you envying
1Corinthians3:4 As long as one saith: I hold of Paul
1Corinthians3:5 What is Paul? what thing is Apollo? but(Only) ministers (are they) by whom ye believed even as the Lord gave every man grace.
1Corinthians3:6 I have planted: Apollo watered: but God gave increase.
1Corinthians3:7 So then
1Corinthians3:8 He that planteth
1Corinthians3:9 We are God's(goddis) laborers: ye are God's(goddis) husbandry
1Corinthians3:10 According to the grace of God given unto me
1Corinthians3:11 For other foundation can no man lay
1Corinthians3:12 If any man build on this foundation
1Corinthians3:13 every man's work shall appear. For the day shall declare it
1Corinthians3:14 If any man's work that he hath built upon
1Corinthians3:15 If any man's work burn
1Corinthians3:16 Are ye not ware that ye are the temple of God
1Corinthians3:17 If any man defile the temple of God
1Corinthians3:18 Let no man deceive himself. If any man seem(think himself) wise among you
1Corinthians3:19 For the wisdom of this world is foolishness with God. For it is written: he compasseth the wise in their craftiness.
1Corinthians3:20 And again
1Corinthians3:21 Therefore let no man rejoice in men. For all things are yours
1Corinthians3:22 whether it be Paul
1Corinthians3:23 and ye are Christ's
1Corinthians4:1 Let men this wise esteem us
1Corinthians4:2 Furthermore it is required of the disposers(stewards) that they be found faithful.
1Corinthians4:3 With me is it but a very small thing
1Corinthians4:4 I know nought by myself: yet am I not thereby justified. It is the Lord that judgeth me.
1Corinthians4:5 Therefore judge nothing before the time
1Corinthians4:6 These things brethren I have described in mine own person
1Corinthians4:7 For who preferreth thee? What hast thou
1Corinthians4:8 Now ye are full: now ye are made rich: ye reign as kings without us: and I would to God ye did reign
1Corinthians4:9 Me thinketh that God hath shewed(set forth) us which are apostles
1Corinthians4:10 we are fools for Christ's(Christes) sake
1Corinthians4:11 Even unto this day we hunger and thirst
1Corinthians4:12 and labour working with our own hands. We are reviled
1Corinthians4:13 We are evil spoken of
1Corinthians4:14 I write not these things to shame you: but as my beloved sons(dear children) I warn you.
1Corinthians4:15 For though ye have ten thousand instructors in Christ: yet have ye not many fathers. In Christ Jesu
1Corinthians4:16 Wherefore I desire(exhort) you to counterfeit(follow) me. (as I follow Christ)
1Corinthians4:17 For this cause have I sent unto you Timotheus
1Corinthians4:18 Some swell(are puft up) as though I would come no more at you:
1Corinthians4:19 but I will come to you shortly
1Corinthians4:20 For the Kingdom of God is not in words
1Corinthians4:21 What will ye? Shall I come unto you with a rod
1Corinthians5:1 There goeth a common saying(report) that there is fornication(whoredom) among you
1Corinthians5:2 And ye swell(are puft up) and have not rather sorrowed
1Corinthians5:3 For I verily as absent in body
1Corinthians5:4 in the name of our Lord Jesu Christ
1Corinthians5:5 to deliver him unto Satan
1Corinthians5:6 Your rejoicing is not good. Know ye not that a little leaven sowereth the whole lump of dough?
1Corinthians5:7 Purge therefore the old leaven
1Corinthians5:8 Therefore let us keep holyday
1Corinthians5:9 I wrote unto you in the(an) pistel(Epistle) that ye should not company with fornicators.(have nothing to do with whoremongers)
1Corinthians5:10 And I meant not at all of the fornicators(whoremongers) of this world
1Corinthians5:11 but now I have written(write) unto you that ye company not together. If any that is called a brother
1Corinthians5:12 For what have I to do to judge them which are without? Do ye not judge them that are within?
1Corinthians5:13 Them that are without
1Corinthians6:1 How dare one of you having business with another
1Corinthians6:2 Do ye not know that the saints shall judge the world? If the world shall be judged by(off) you: are ye not good enough to judge small trifles.(matters)
1Corinthians6:3 Know ye not how that we shall judge the angels? How much more may we judge things that pertain to the life?(temporal life?)
1Corinthians6:4 If ye have judgements of worldly(temporal) matters
1Corinthians6:5 This I say to your shame. Is there utterly no wise man among you? what not one at all? that can judge between brother and brother?
1Corinthians6:6 but one brother goeth to law with another: and that under(before) the unbelievers?
1Corinthians6:7 Now therefore there is utterly a fault among you
1Corinthians6:8 Nay ye yourselves do wrong
1Corinthians6:9 Do ye not remember how that the unrighteous shall not inherit the kingdom of God? Be not deceived. For neither fornicators
1Corinthians6:10 neither thieves
1Corinthians6:11 And such were ye verily: but ye are washed: ye are sanctified: ye are justified(made righteous) by the name of the Lord Jesus: And by the spirit of our God.
1Corinthians6:12 All things are lawful unto me: but all things are not profitable. I may do all things: but I will be brought under no man's power.
1Corinthians6:13 Meats are ordained for the belly
1Corinthians6:14 God hath raised up the Lord
1Corinthians6:15 Other(Ether) remember ye not
1Corinthians6:16 Do ye not understand(Or do ye not know) that he which coupleth himself with an harlot
1Corinthians6:17 but he that is joined(cleaveth) unto the Lord is one spirit.
1Corinthians6:18 Flee fornication.(whoredom) All sins that a man doth
1Corinthians6:19 (Ether) Know ye not how that your bodies are the temple of the holy ghost
1Corinthians6:20 For ye are dearly bought. Therefore glorify(Praise) ye God in your bodies and in your spirits
1Corinthians7:1 As concerning the things whereof ye wrote unto me: It is good for a man
1Corinthians7:2 Nevertheless to avoid fornication
1Corinthians7:3 Let the man give unto the wife due benevolence. Likewise also the wife unto the man.
1Corinthians7:4 The wife hath not power over her own body: but the husband: And likewise the man hath not power over his own body: but the wife.
1Corinthians7:5 Withdraw not your selves one from another except it be with consent for a time
1Corinthians7:6 This I say of favour
1Corinthians7:7 For I would that all men were as I my self am: but every man hath his proper gift of God
1Corinthians7:8 I say unto the unmarried men
1Corinthians7:9 but and if they cannot abstain
1Corinthians7:10 Unto the married command not I
1Corinthians7:11 If she separate herself
1Corinthians7:12 To the remnant speak I
1Corinthians7:13 And the woman which hath to her husband an infidel
1Corinthians7:14 For the unbelieving husband is sanctified by the wife: and the unbelieving wife is sanctified by the husband. Or else were your children unclean: but now are they pure.(holy)
1Corinthians7:15 But and if the unbelieving depart
1Corinthians7:16 For how knowest thou o woman
1Corinthians7:17 but even as God hath distributed to every man. As the Lord hath called every person
1Corinthians7:18 If any man be called being circumcised
1Corinthians7:19 Circumcision is nothing
1Corinthians7:20 Let every man abide in the same state wherein he was called.
1Corinthians7:21 Art thou called a servant? care not for it. Nevertheless if thou mayst be free
1Corinthians7:22 For he that is called in the Lord being a servant
1Corinthians7:23 Ye are dearly bought
1Corinthians7:24 Brethren let every man wherein he is called
1Corinthians7:25 As concerning virgins
1Corinthians7:26 I suppose that it is good for the present necessity. For it is good for a man so to be.
1Corinthians7:27 Art thou bound unto a wife? seek not to be loosed.(lowsed) Art thou loosed(lowsed) from a wife? seek not a wife.
1Corinthians7:28 But and if thou take a wife
1Corinthians7:29 This say I brethren
1Corinthians7:30 and they that weep
1Corinthians7:31 And they that use this world
1Corinthians7:32 I would have you without care
1Corinthians7:33 but he that hath married
1Corinthians7:34 There is difference between a virgin and a wife. The single woman careth for the things of the Lord
1Corinthians7:35 This speak I for your profit
1Corinthians7:36 If any man think that it is uncomely for his virgin if she pass the time of marriage
1Corinthians7:37 Nevertheless
1Corinthians7:38 So then he that joineth his virgin in marriage doth well. And(But) he that joineth not his virgin in marriage doth better.
1Corinthians7:39 The wife is bound to the law as long as her husband liveth. If her husband sleep
1Corinthians7:40 But she is happier if she so abide
1Corinthians8:1 To speak of things dedicated unto idols
1Corinthians8:2 If any man think that he knoweth any thing
1Corinthians8:3 But if any man love God
1Corinthians8:4 To speak of meat dedicated unto idols
1Corinthians8:5 And though there be that are called gods
1Corinthians8:6 but(yet) unto us is there(but) one God
1Corinthians8:7 But every man hath not knowledge. For some suppose that there is an idol
1Corinthians8:8 Meat maketh us not acceptable to God: Neither if we eat are we the better: Neither if we eat not are we the worse.(less)
1Corinthians8:9 But take heed that your liberty cause not the weak to fall.(be not an occasion of falling unto the weak)
1Corinthians8:10 For if some man see thee which hast knowledge sit at meat in the idol's temple shall not the conscience of him which is weak be boldened(occasioned) to eat those things which are offered unto the idol?
1Corinthians8:11 And so thorow thy knowledge shall the weak brother perish for whom Christ died.
1Corinthians8:12 When we(ye) sin so against the brethren and wound their weak consciences
1Corinthians8:13 Wherefore if meat hurt(offend) my brother
1Corinthians9:1 Am I not an apostle? am I not free? have I not seen Jesus Christ our Lord? Are not ye my work in the Lord.
1Corinthians9:2 If I be not an apostle unto other
1Corinthians9:3 Mine answer to them that ask me
1Corinthians9:4 Have we not power to eat and to drink?
1Corinthians9:5 Either have we not power to lead about a sister to wife as well as other apostles
1Corinthians9:6 Either only I and Barnabas have not power this to do?
1Corinthians9:7 Who goeth a warfare any time at his own cost?(upon his own wages?) who planteth a vineyard and eateth not of the fruit?(fruit thereof?) or who feedeth a flock and eateth not of the milk?
1Corinthians9:8 Say I these things after the manner of men? or sayth not the law the same also?
1Corinthians9:9 For it is written in the law of Moses: Thou shall not muzzle(mosell) the mouth of the ox that treadeth out the corn. Doth God take thought for oxen?
1Corinthians9:10 Either(Or) saith he it not all together for our sakes? For our sakes no doubt this is written: that he which eareth should ear in(upon) hope: and that he which thresheth in(upon) hope
1Corinthians9:11 If we sow unto you spiritual things: is it a great thing if we reap your carnal things?
1Corinthians9:12 If other be partakers of this power over you? wherefore are not we rather. Nevertheless we have not used this power: but suffer all things lest we should hinder the gospel(gospell) of Christ.
1Corinthians9:13 Do ye not understand how that they which minister in the temple: have their finding(living) of the temple? And they which wait at the altar are partakers with(enjoy) the altar?
1Corinthians9:14 Even so also did the Lord ordain
1Corinthians9:15 But I have used none of these things. Neither wrote I these things that it should be so done unto me.(For) It were better for me to die than any man should take this rejoicing from me.
1Corinthians9:16 In that I preach the gospel(gospell) I have nothing to rejoice of.(I need not boast my self) For necessity is put unto me.(for I must needs do it) Woe is it unto me if I preach not the gospel.(gospell)
1Corinthians9:17 If I do it with a good will
1Corinthians9:18 What is my reward then? Verily that when I preach the gospel
1Corinthians9:19 For though I be free from all men
1Corinthians9:20 And unto the jews
1Corinthians9:21 To them that were without law
1Corinthians9:22 To the weak became I as weak
1Corinthians9:23 And this I do for the Gospel's sake
1Corinthians9:24 Perceive ye not how that they which run in a course
1Corinthians9:25 Every man that proveth masteries abstaineth from all things. And they do it to obtain a corruptible crown: but we to obtain an everlasting(uncorruptible) crown:
1Corinthians9:26 I therefore so run
1Corinthians9:27 but I tame my body and bring him(it) into subjection
1Corinthians10:1 Brethren I would not that ye should be ignorant of this
1Corinthians10:2 and were all baptised under Moses in the cloud and in the sea:
1Corinthians10:3 and did all eat of one spiritual meat
1Corinthians10:4 and did all drink of one manner of spiritual drink. And they drank of that spiritual rock that followed them
1Corinthians10:5 But in many of them had God no delight. For they were overthrown(smitten down) in the wilderness.
1Corinthians10:6 These are examples to us that we should not lust after evil things
1Corinthians10:7 Neither be ye worshippers of images as were some of them according as it is written: The people sat down to eat and drink
1Corinthians10:8 Neither let us commit fornication(whoredom) as some of them committed fornication
1Corinthians10:9 Neither let us tempt Christ
1Corinthians10:10 Neither murmur ye as some of them murmured
1Corinthians10:11 All these things happened upon them for ensamples
1Corinthians10:12 Wherefore let him that thinketh he standeth
1Corinthians10:13 There hath none other temptation taken you
1Corinthians10:14 Wherefore my dear beloved
1Corinthians10:15 I speak as unto them which have discretion
1Corinthians10:16 Is not the cup of blessing which we bless
1Corinthians10:17 because that we (though we be many) yet are one bread
1Corinthians10:18 Behold Israel which walketh carnally.(after the flesh) Are not they which eat of the sacrifice
1Corinthians10:19 What say I then? that the image(Idoll) is anything? or that it which is offered to images(the Idoll) is anything?
1Corinthians10:20 Nay
1Corinthians10:21 Ye cannot drink of the cup of the Lord
1Corinthians10:22 Other(Either) shall we provoke the Lord? other(Or) are we stronger than he?
1Corinthians10:23 All things are lawful unto me
1Corinthians10:24 Let no man seek his own profit: but let every man seek his neighbors(seek another's) wealth.
1Corinthians10:25 Whatsoever is sold in the market
1Corinthians10:26 For the earth is the Lord's
1Corinthians10:27 If any of them which believe not bid you to a feast
1Corinthians10:28 but and if any man say unto you: this is dedicated(offered) unto idols
1Corinthians10:29 Conscience I say
1Corinthians10:30 For if I take my part with thanks:(thanksgiving) why am I evil spoken of for that thing wherefore I give thanks?
1Corinthians10:31 Whether therefore ye eat or drink
1Corinthians10:32 See that ye give none occasion of evil
1Corinthians10:33 even as I please all men in all things not seeking mine own profit
1Corinthians11:1 Follow me as I do Christ.
1Corinthians11:2 I commend you brethren that ye remember me in all things
1Corinthians11:3 I would ye knew(But I certify you) that Christ is the head of every man; and the woman's head is the man; and Christ's(Christes) head is God.(And the man is the womans head. And God is Christes head.)
1Corinthians11:4 Every man praying or prophesying having any thing on his head
1Corinthians11:5 Every woman that prayeth or prophesieth bare headed
1Corinthians11:6 If the woman be not covered
1Corinthians11:7 A man ought not to cover his head
1Corinthians11:8 For the man is not of the woman
1Corinthians11:9 Neither was the man created for the woman's sake: but the woman for the man's sake.
1Corinthians11:10 For this cause ought the woman to have power in(on) her head
1Corinthians11:11 Nevertheless
1Corinthians11:12 For as the woman is of the man
1Corinthians11:13 Judge in yourselves whether it be comely that a woman pray unto God bareheaded.
1Corinthians11:14 Or else doth not nature teach you
1Corinthians11:15 and a praise to a woman if she have long hair? For her hair is given her to cover her withal.
1Corinthians11:16 If there be any man among you that lusteth to strive
1Corinthians11:17 This I warn you of
1Corinthians11:18 First of all when ye come together in the congregation
1Corinthians11:19 For there must be sects among you
1Corinthians11:20 When ye come together in one place
1Corinthians11:21 For every man beginneth afore to eat his own supper. And one is hungry
1Corinthians11:22 Have ye not houses to eat and to drink in? Or else despise ye the congregation of God? and shame them that have not? what shall I say unto you? shall I praise you? in this praise I you not.
1Corinthians11:23 That which I gave(I delivered) unto you I received of the Lord. For the Lord Jesus the same night in the which he was betrayed
1Corinthians11:24 and thanked and brake
1Corinthians11:25 After the same manner he took the cup when supper was done saying: This cup is the new testament in my blood
1Corinthians11:26 For as often as ye shall eat this bread
1Corinthians11:27 Wherefore whosoever shall eat of this bread
1Corinthians11:28 Let a man therefore examine himself

1Corinthians11:30 For this cause many are weak and sick among you

1Corinthians11:32 (But) When we are judged of the Lord we are chastened

1Corinthians12:1 In spiritual things brethren I would not have you ignorant.
1Corinthians12:2 Ye know that ye were gentiles
1Corinthians12:3 Wherefore I declare unto you that no man speaking in(thorow) the spirit of God defieth Jesus. Also no man can say that Jesus is the Lord: but by the holy ghost.
1Corinthians12:4 There are diversities of gifts verily
1Corinthians12:5 And there are differences of administrations
1Corinthians12:6 And there are divers manners of operations
1Corinthians12:7 The gifts of the spirit are given to every man to profit the congregation.
1Corinthians12:8 To one(won) is given (thorow the spirit) the utterance of wisdom: to another is given the utterance of knowledge by(according to) the same spirit:
1Corinthians12:9 to another is given faith
1Corinthians12:10 To another power to do miracles: To another prophecy; To another judgement of spirits;(judgement to discern spirits) To another divers tongues: To another the interpretation of tongues:
1Corinthians12:11 and these all worketh even the self same spirit
1Corinthians12:12 For as the body is one
1Corinthians12:13 For in one spirit are we all baptised to make one body
1Corinthians12:14 For the body is not one member
1Corinthians12:15 If the foot say: I am not the hand
1Corinthians12:16 and if the ear say I am not the eye: therefore I am not (a member) of the body: is he therefore not (a member) of the body?
1Corinthians12:17 if all the body were an eye: where were then the ear? if all were hearing: where were the(where then the) smelling?
1Corinthians12:18 But now hath God disposed(set) the members
1Corinthians12:19 If they were all one member: where were the body?
1Corinthians12:20 Now are there many members
1Corinthians12:21 And the eye cannot say unto the hand: I have no need of thee: nor the head also to the feet: I have no need of you.
1Corinthians12:22 Yea rather a great deal those members of the body which seem to be most feeble
1Corinthians12:23 And upon those members of that body which we think least honest
1Corinthians12:24 For our honest members need it not: but God hath so disposed(measured) the body
1Corinthians12:25 lest there should be any strife in the body: but that the members should indifferently care for one another.
1Corinthians12:26 And if one member suffer all suffer with him: if one member be had in honour
1Corinthians12:27 Ye are the body of Christ
1Corinthians12:28 And God hath also ordained in the congregation
1Corinthians12:29 Are all apostles? are all prophets? Are all teachers? are all doers of miracles?
1Corinthians12:30 have all the gifts of healing? Do all speak with tongues? do all interpret?
1Corinthians12:31 Covet after the best gifts. And yet shew I unto you a more excellent way.
1Corinthians13:1 Though I spake with the tongues of men and angels
1Corinthians13:2 And though I could prophesy
1Corinthians13:3 And though I bestowed all my goods to feed the poor
1Corinthians13:4 Love suffereth long
1Corinthians13:5 dealeth not dishonestly
1Corinthians13:6 rejoiceth not in(over) iniquity: but rejoiceth in the truth
1Corinthians13:7 suffereth(beareth) all things
1Corinthians13:8 Though that prophesying fail
1Corinthians13:9 For our knowledge is unperfect

1Corinthians13:11 When I was a child

1Corinthians13:13 Now abideth faith

1Corinthians14:3 But he that prophesieth speaketh unto men

1Corinthians14:8 And also if the trumpet give an uncertain voice
1Corinthians14:9 Even so likewise when ye speak with tongues
1Corinthians14:10 Many kinds of voices are in the world
1Corinthians14:11 If I know not what the voice meaneth
1Corinthians14:12 Even so ye (forasmuch as ye covet spiritual gifts) seek that ye may have plenty unto the edifying of the congregation.
1Corinthians14:13 Wherefore let him that speaketh with tongues
1Corinthians14:14 If I pray with tongues

1Corinthians14:28 But if there be no interpreter

1Corinthians14:30 If any revelation be made to another that sitteth by

1Corinthians15:2 by the which also ye are saved
1Corinthians15:3 For first of all I delivered unto you that which I received: how that Christ died for our sins
1Corinthians15:4 and that he was buried
1Corinthians15:5 and that he was seen of Cephas
1Corinthians15:6 After that he was seen of more than five hundred brethren at once: of which many remain unto this day
1Corinthians15:7 After that appeared he to James
1Corinthians15:8 And last of all he was seen of me
1Corinthians15:9 For I am the least of all the apostles
1Corinthians15:10 But by the favour(grace) of God I am that I am. And his favour(grace) which is in me was not in vain: but I laboured more abundantly than they all
1Corinthians15:11 Whether it were I or they
1Corinthians15:12 If Christ be preached how that he rose from death:(the dead:) how say some that are among you
1Corinthians15:13 If there be no rising again(resurrection) of death:(the dead:) then is Christ not risen.
1Corinthians15:14 If Christ be not risen
1Corinthians15:15 Yea
1Corinthians15:16 For if the dead rise not again
1Corinthians15:17 If it be so that Christ rose not
1Corinthians15:18 And (thereto) they which are fallen asleep in Christ
1Corinthians15:19 If in this life only we believe(hope) on Christ
1Corinthians15:20 (But) Now is Christ risen from death
1Corinthians15:21 For by a man came death
1Corinthians15:22 For as by Adam all die: even so by Christ
1Corinthians15:23 and every man in his own order: The first is Christ
1Corinthians15:24 Then cometh the end
1Corinthians15:25 For he must rule(reign) till he have put all his enemies under his feet.
1Corinthians15:26 The last enemy that shall be destroyed is death.
1Corinthians15:27 For he hath put all things under his feet. But when he saith
1Corinthians15:28 When all things are subdued unto him: then shall the son also himself be subject unto him that put all things under him
1Corinthians15:29 Other(Either) else what do they which are baptised over the dead
1Corinthians15:30 (Yea) And why stand we in jeopardy every hour?
1Corinthians15:31 by our rejoicing which I have in Christ Jesu our Lord
1Corinthians15:32 That I have fought with beasts at Ephesus after the manner of men
1Corinthians15:33 Be not deceived: malicious(evil) speakings corrupt good manners.
1Corinthians15:34 Awake truly out of sleep
1Corinthians15:35 But some man will(might) say: how shall the dead arise? with what(what manner of) body shall they come? (in)
1Corinthians15:36 Thou fool
1Corinthians15:37 And what sowest thou? Thou sowest not that body that shall be: but bare corn (I mean either of wheat
1Corinthians15:38 and God giveth it a body at his pleasure
1Corinthians15:39 All flesh is not one manner of flesh: but there is one manner flesh of men
1Corinthians15:40 There are celestial(heavenly) bodies
1Corinthians15:41 There is one manner glory(clearness) of the sun
1Corinthians15:42 So is the resurrection of the dead. It is sown in corruption
1Corinthians15:43 It is sown in dishonour
1Corinthians15:44 It is sown a natural body
1Corinthians15:45 As it is written: The first man Adam was made a living soul: and the last Adam was made a quickening spirit:
1Corinthians15:46 but(Howbeit) that is not first which is spiritual: but that which is natural
1Corinthians15:47 The first man is of the earth
1Corinthians15:48 As is the earthy
1Corinthians15:49 And as we have born the image of the earthy
1Corinthians15:50 This say I brethren
1Corinthians15:51 Behold I shew a mystery unto you: we shall not all sleep: but we shall all be changed
1Corinthians15:52 and that in a moment
1Corinthians15:53 For this corruptible must put on incorruptibility: and this mortal must put on immortality.
1Corinthians15:54 When this corruptible hath put on incorruptibility: and this mortal hath put on immortality: then shall be brought to pass the saying that is written: Death is consumed into victory.(then shall the word be fulfilled that is written: Death is swallowed up in victory.)
1Corinthians15:55 Death where is thy sting? Hell where is thy victory?
1Corinthians15:56 The sting of death is sin. (:and) The strength of sin is the law:
1Corinthians15:57 But thanks be unto God
1Corinthians15:58 Therefore my dear brethren

2Corinthians7:9 But I now rejoice
2Corinthians7:10 For ye sorrowed godly: so that in nothing were ye hurt by us. For godly sorrow causeth repentance unto health

2Corinthians7:12 Wherefore though I have written(wrote) unto you
2Corinthians7:13 Therefore we are comforted
2Corinthians7:14 I am therefore not now ashamed
2Corinthians7:15 And now is his inward affection more abundant toward you
2Corinthians7:16 I rejoice that I may be bold over you in all things.

2Corinthians10:1 I Paul myself beseech you by the meekness and softness of Christ
2Corinthians10:2 I beseech you that I need not to be bold when I am present (with that same confidence

2Corinthians10:4 For the weapons of our war are not carnal things
2Corinthians10:5 wherewith we overthrow imaginations

2Corinthians10:7 Look ye on things after the utter appearance. If any man trust in himself that he is Christ's
2Corinthians10:8 And though I should boast myself somewhat more of our authority which the Lord hath given us to edify and not to destroy you
2Corinthians10:9 This say I
2Corinthians10:10 For the pistels (saith he) are sore and strong: but his bodily presence is weak
2Corinthians10:11 Let him that is such think on this wise
2Corinthians10:12 For we cannot find in our hearts to make ourselves of the number of them
2Corinthians10:13 But we will not rejoice(not boast ourselves) above measure: but according to the quantity of the measure which(measure of the rule wherewith) God hath distributed unto us
2Corinthians10:14 For we stretch not out ourselves beyond measure as though we had not reached unto you. For even unto you have we come with the gospel(gospell) of Christ
2Corinthians10:15 and we boast not ourselves out of measure in other men's labors: yea and we hope; When your faith is increased among you
2Corinthians10:16 And to preach the gospel(gospell) in those regions which are beyond you: and not to rejoice of that which is by another man's measure prepared all ready.(already.)

2Corinthians11:2 For I am jealous over you with godly jealousy. For I coupled(have married) you to one man

2Corinthians11:13 For these false apostles are deceitful workers
2Corinthians11:14 And no marvel

2Corinthians11:17 That I speak
2Corinthians11:18 Seeing that many rejoice(boast) after the flesh I will rejoice(boast) also.
2Corinthians11:19 For ye suffer fools gladly because that ye yourselves are wise.
2Corinthians11:20 For ye suffer even if a man bring you into bondage: if a man devour:(put you to dishonesty) if a man take: if a man exalt himself: if a man smite you on the face.
2Corinthians11:21 I speak as concerning rebuke
2Corinthians11:22 They are Hebrews
2Corinthians11:23 They are the ministers of Christ (I speak as a fool) I am more: In labors more abundant: In stripes above measure: In prison more plenteously:
2Corinthians11:24 In death often. Of the jews five times received I every time forty stripes
2Corinthians11:25 Thrice was I beaten with rods. I was once stoned. I suffered thrice shipwreck. Night and day have I been in the deep of the sea.
2Corinthians11:26 In journeying often: In perils of waters In perils of robbers.(perils among murthurers) In jeopardies of mine own nation:(In perils among the Jews) In jeopardies among the heathen. I have been in perils in cities

2Corinthians12:8 For this thing besought I the Lord thrice
2Corinthians12:9 and he said unto me: my grace is sufficient for thee. For my strength is made perfect thorow(throu) weakness. Very gladly therefore will I rejoice of my weakness
2Corinthians12:10 Therefore have I delectation(am I content) in infirmities
2Corinthians12:11 I am made a fool in boasting myself. Ye have compelled me: I ought to have been commended of you. For in nothing was I inferior unto the chief apostles
2Corinthians12:12 yet the tokens of an apostle were wrought among you with all patience: with signs
2Corinthians12:13 For what is it wherein ye were inferiors unto other congregations? except it be therein that I was not grievous unto you. Forgive me this wrong done unto you.

Galatians1:7 which is nothing else
Galatians1:8 Nevertheless though we ourselves
Galatians1:9 As I said before

Galatians1:13 (For) Ye have heard of my conversation in times past in the jews' ways
Galatians1:14 and prevailed in the jews' law

Galatians1:16 for to declare his son by me

Galatians1:22 and was unknown as touching my person unto the congregations of Jewry
Galatians1:23 But they heard only
Galatians1:24 And they glorified(praised) God in me.(on my behalf.)

Galatians3:12 The law is not of faith: but the man that fulfilleth the things contained in the law
Galatians3:13 (But) Christ hath delivered us from the curse of the law
Galatians3:14 that the blessing of Abraham might come on the gentiles thorow Jesus Christ
Galatians3:15 Brethren I will speak after the manner of men. Though it be but a man's testament
Galatians3:16 To Abraham and his seed were the promises made. He saith(seyth) not
Galatians3:17 This I say that the law which began afterward
Galatians3:18 For if the inheritance come of the law
Galatians3:19 Wherefore then serveth the law? The law was added because of transgression (till the seed came to which the promise was made) and it was ordained by angels in the hand of a mediator.(given of angels
Galatians3:20 A mediator is not a mediator of one.(of one only) But God is one.
Galatians3:21 Is the law then against the promise of God? God forbid. (Howbeit) If there had been a law given which could have given life: then no doubt righteousness should have come by the law:
Galatians3:22 but the scripture concluded all things under sin
Galatians3:23 Before that faith came
Galatians3:24 Wherefore(Thus) the law was our schoolmaster unto the time of Christ
Galatians3:25 But after that faith is come

Ephesians6:11 Put on the armour of God
Ephesians6:12 For we wrestle not against flesh and blood: but against rule
Ephesians6:13 For this cause take unto you the armour of God
Ephesians6:14 Stand therefore and your loins gird about with verity
Ephesians6:15 and shod with shoes prepared by the gospel(gospell) of peace.
Ephesians6:16 Above all take to you the shield of faith
Ephesians6:17 And take the helmet of health
Ephesians6:18 and pray always with all manner prayer and supplication: and that in the spirit: and watch thereunto with all instance and supplication for all saints
Ephesians6:19 and for me
Ephesians6:20 whereof I am a messenger in bonds
Ephesians6:21 But that ye may also know that condition(case) I am in
Ephesians6:22 whom I sent unto you for the same purpose
Ephesians6:23 Peace be with(unto) the brethren
Ephesians6:24 Grace be with all them which love our Lord Jesus Christ in pureness
Philippians1:1 Paul and Timotheus the servants of Jesu Christ. To all the saints in Christ Jesu which are at Philippos
Philippians1:2 Grace be with you and peace from God our father
Philippians1:3 I thank my God with all remembrance of you
Philippians1:4 always in all my prayers for you all
Philippians1:5 because of the fellowship which ye have in the gospel(gospell) from the first day unto now
Philippians1:6 and am surely certified of this
Philippians1:7 as it becometh me so to judge of you all
Philippians1:8 (For) God beareth me record how greatly I long after you all from the very heart root(rote) in Jesus Christ.
Philippians1:9 And this I pray
Philippians1:10 that ye might accept things most excellent
Philippians1:11 filled with the fruits of righteousness
Philippians1:12 I would ye understood brethren that my business is happened unto the greater furthering(furtherance) of the gospel.(gospell)
Philippians1:13 So that my bonds in Christ are manifest thorow out all the judgement hall: and in all other places;
Philippians1:14 Insomuch that many of the brethren in the Lord are boldened thorow my bonds
Philippians1:15 Some there are which preach Christ of envy and strife
Philippians1:16 The one part preacheth Christ of strife
Philippians1:17 The other part of love
Philippians1:18 What thing is this? Notwithstanding by all manner ways
Philippians1:19 For I know that this shall be for my health
Philippians1:20 as I heartily look for and hope
Philippians1:21 For Christ is to me life
Philippians1:22 If it chance me to live in the flesh
Philippians1:23 I am constrained of two things: I desire to be loosed
Philippians1:24 Nevertheless to abide in the flesh is more needful for you.
Philippians1:25 And this am I sure of
Philippians1:26 that ye may more abundantly rejoice in Jesus Christ thorow me
Philippians1:27 Only let your conversation be
Philippians1:28 and in nothing fearing your adversaries: which is to them a token of perdition
Philippians1:29 For unto you it is given
Philippians1:30 and have even the same fight which ye saw me have and now hear of me.
Philippians2:1 If there be among you any consolation in Christ
Philippians2:2 fulfil my joy
Philippians2:3 that nothing be done thorow strife or vain glory
Philippians2:4 so that ye consider every man
Philippians2:5 Let the same mind be in you the which(that) was in Christ Jesu:
Philippians2:6 Which being in the shape of God
Philippians2:7 Nevertheless he made himself of no reputation
Philippians2:8 He humbled himself and became obedient unto the death
Philippians2:9 Wherefore God hath exalted him
Philippians2:10 that in the name of Jesus should every knee bow
Philippians2:11 and that all tongues should confess that Jesus Christ is the Lord unto the praise of God the father.
Philippians2:12 Wherefore my dearly beloved
Philippians2:13 For it is God which worketh in you
Philippians2:14 Do all things without murmuring and disputing
Philippians2:15 that ye may be faultless
Philippians2:16 holding fast the word of life
Philippians2:17 Yea and though I be offered up on your sacrifice and of your serving of God in the faith:(i be offered up upon the offering and sacrifice of your faith:) I rejoice and rejoice with you all.
Philippians2:18 For the same cause also
Philippians2:19 I trust in the Lord Jesus for to send Timotheus shortly unto you
Philippians2:20 For I have no man that is so like minded to me
Philippians2:21 For all others seek their own
Philippians2:22 Ye know the proof of him
Philippians2:23 Him I hope to send as soon as I know how it will go with me.
Philippians2:24 I trust in the Lord that I also myself shall come shortly.
Philippians2:25 I supposed(thought) it necessary to send brother Epaphreditus unto you
Philippians2:26 For he longed after you
Philippians2:27 and no doubt he was sick
Philippians2:28 I sent him therefore the diligentlier
Philippians2:29 Receive him therefore in the Lord with all gladness
Philippians2:30 because that for the work of Christ he went so far
Philippians3:1 Moreover brethren mine
Philippians3:2 Beware of dogs
Philippians3:3 For we are circumcision which worship God in the spirit
Philippians3:4 though I have whereof I might rejoice in the flesh. If any other man thinketh that he hath whereof he might trust(rejoice) in the flesh: much more I:
Philippians3:5 circumcised the eighth day
Philippians3:6 and as concerning ferventness I persecuted the congregation
Philippians3:7 But the things that were winning(vantage) unto me I counted loss for Christ's(Christes) sake.
Philippians3:8 Yea I think all things but loss for that excellent knowledge's sake of Christ Jesu my Lord. For whom I have counted all thing loss
Philippians3:9 and might be found in him
Philippians3:10 in knowing him
Philippians3:11 if by any means I might attain unto the resurrection from death.(of the dead.)
Philippians3:12 Not as though I had all ready received(attained to) it
Philippians3:13 Brethren I count not myself that I have gotten it: but one thing I say: I forget that which is behind me
Philippians3:14 and press unto that mark appointed
Philippians3:15 Let us therefore as many as be perfect be thus wise minded: and if ye be other wise minded
Philippians3:16 Nevertheless in that whereunto we are come
Philippians3:17 Brethren be followers of me
Philippians3:18 For many walk (of whom I have told you often
Philippians3:19 whose end is damnation
Philippians3:20 But our conversation is in heaven
Philippians3:21 which shall change into another fashion our vile bodies
Philippians4:1 Herefore(Therefore my) brethren dearly beloved and longed for
Philippians4:2 I pray Euodias
Philippians4:3 Yea and I beseech thee faithful yokefellow
Philippians4:4 Rejoice in the Lord alway
Philippians4:5 Let your softness be known unto all men. The Lord is even at hand.
Philippians4:6 Be not careful: but in all things shew your petition unto God in prayer and supplication with giving of thanks.
Philippians4:7 And the peace of God which passeth all understanding keep your hearts
Philippians4:8 Furthermore brethren
Philippians4:9 which ye have both learned and received
Philippians4:10 I rejoice in the Lord greatly
Philippians4:11 I speak not because of necessity. For I have learned in whatsoever estate I am
Philippians4:12 I can both cast down myself
Philippians4:13 I can do all things thorow the help of Christ
Philippians4:14 Notwithstanding ye have well done
Philippians4:15 Ye of Philippos know that in the beginning of the gospel
Philippians4:16 For when I was in Thessalonica
Philippians4:17 not that I desire(seek) gifts: but I desire(seek) abundant fruit on your part.(in your reckoning)
Philippians4:18 I received all
Philippians4:19 My God fulfil all your needs thorow his glorious riches in Jesu Christ.
Philippians4:20 Unto God and our father be praise for ever more Amen.

Philippians4:22 All the saints salute you: and most of all(specially) they which are of the emperors household.
